name: Tom Fitton
subject: Maxine Waters Scandal Exposed
body:
Lawsuit Over Pentagon Attack on Tucker Carlson

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH SUES FOR PENTAGON COMMUNICATIONS ABOUT TUCKER CARLSON,
FOX NEWS

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55693&L=24896&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdmlkZW9zL2ZhdWNpLXd1aGFuLXBlbnRhZ29uLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUxNTAwMTIxNg==]

As Joe Biden and his handlers remake the federal government in their
own image they are clumsily tripping over the U.S. Constitution.
Consider the Pentagon and Tucker Carlson of Fox News.

In the March 9, 2021, broadcast of “Tucker Carlson
Tonight,” Carlson said
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55693&L=22885&F=T&],
in criticizing a “woke” public relations push by the military:

So we’ve got new hairstyles and maternity flight suits. Pregnant
women are going to fight our wars. It’s a mockery of the U.S.
military. Well, China’s military becomes more masculine as it’s
assembled the world’s largest navy.... It’s a mockery of the U.S.
military.
Pentagon spokesman John Kirby said that Defense Secretary Austin
was “revulsed
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55693&L=22880&F=T&
by Carlson’s comments. Official military Twitter accounts were also
used to attack
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55693&L=22881&F=T&]
Carlson’s
views.

What was going on behind the scenes at the Pentagon? To find out we
filed a FOIA suit against the Department of Defense seeking
communications between Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin and other top
military officials regarding Fox News and Carlson, whose recent
commentary on the U.S. military was attacked by top Pentagon
officials (_Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Department of
Defense_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55693&L=22878&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZG9kLXNlYy1kZWZfdHVja2VyLWNhcmxzb24tY29tcGxhaW50LTAxMjI1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUxNTAwMTIxNg==]
(No.
1:21-cv-01225)).

We sued here in federal court after the Department of Defense failed
to reply to our March 16, 2021, request for:

All emails sent between Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin and email
accounts ending in .gov and/or .mil containing the terms “Tucker
Carlson” and/or “Fox News.”

All emails sent between Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Gen.
Mark Milley and email accounts ending in .gov and/or .mil containing
the terms “Tucker Carlson” and/or “Fox News.”

All emails sent between Vice Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff
Gen. John Hyten and email accounts ending in .gov and/or .mil
containing the terms “Tucker Carlson” and/or “Fox News.”
We’re asking for emails sent between March 1, 2021, and March 16,
2021.

On his March 11 show, Carlson accused the Pentagon
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55693&L=22882&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vb3Bpbmlvbi90dWNrZXItY2FybHNvbi1iaWRlbi1wZW50YWdvbi1taWxpdGFyeS13b2tlbmVzcy1sbG95ZC1hdXN0aW4/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MTUwMDEyMTY=]
of
declaring “war on a domestic news operation:”

Since when does the Pentagon declare war on a domestic news operation?
We can’t remember that ever happening. But we’re going to pass on
that, because this is bigger than a feud with some flack at the
Pentagon. This is genuinely worrisome.
Texas Republican Sen. Ted Cruz sent a letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55693&L=22883&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY3J1ei5zZW5hdGUuZ292Lz9wPXByZXNzX3JlbGVhc2UmaWQ9NTY4OSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUxNTAwMTIxNg==]
to Defense
Secretary Austin demanding a meeting with the Commandant of the Marine
Corps to account for the attacks on Carlson and “a plan to prevent
other military units from being similarly mobilized against the speech
of American citizens.”

In the letter, Sen. Cruz wrote:

I am deeply troubled that the comments you made, and the military’s
broader obligation to avoid political endorsements and controversy,
are being systematically undermined for the sake of leftwing ideology
and political expediency. The last week has witnessed the Pentagon
mobilize systematic, public attacks against television host Tucker
Carlson that in substance, tone, and political resonance are
inexplicably inappropriate.
The Department of Defense has rules about how members of the U.S.
military can participate in politics. Active military members may
express a personal opinion on political candidates and issues, but
they cannot
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55693&L=22884&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubWlsaXRhcnkuY29tL2RhaWx5LW5ld3MvMjAxNi8wMi8wOS9haXItZm9yY2Utd2FybnMtYWlybWVuLXRhbGtpbmctcG9saXRpY3Mtc29jaWFsLW1lZGlhLmh0bWw/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MTUwMDEyMTY=]
express
opinions on behalf of or as a representative of the U.S. military.

We are deeply disturbed over the Pentagon’s illicit secrecy about
its coordinated attacks on the First Amendment-protected speech of
Tucker Carlson.

To sum up, we asked the Pentagon to search two weeks’ worth of
email, in three accounts, using two search terms. And they
stonewalled.

The fact that we must take the Pentagon to federal court for these
documents suggests the agency has something to hide.

ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION OVERWHELMS SHERIFFS; FAMILIES EXPOSED TO GANG
VIOLENCE

As the corrupt media is focused on promoting the anti-Trump politician
Liz Cheney, the deadly dangerous Biden border crisis continues
unabated. But sheriffs of many counties across the country are making
a stand for the rule of law, our sovereignty, and the rule of law --
as our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55693&L=22890&F=T&].

Local law enforcement agencies nationwide are overwhelmed with
criminal activity linked to a huge increase in illegal immigration,
and families are being exposed to violence associated with drug
trafficking and transnational gangs, according to hundreds of sheriffs
across the United States. In a letter
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55693&L=24897&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFpcnVzLm9yZy9zaXRlcy9kZWZhdWx0L2ZpbGVzLzIwMjEtMDQvUHJlc2lkZW50TGV0dGVyLnBkZj91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUxNTAwMTIxNg==]
to
President Joe Biden, the law enforcement officials in more than two
dozen states blast the administration’s “reckless and
irresponsible” open border policies that are exposing innocent
citizens to illegal alien violence. Titled, “Help America’s
Sheriffs Keep Our Neighborhoods and Communities Safe by Halting
Illegal Immigration,” the document asserts that the crisis began
when Biden was vice president.

“In a myriad of ways, you and your administration are encouraging
and sanctioning lawlessness and the victimization of the people of the
United States of America, all in the name of mass illegal
immigration,” the sheriffs write. “What is most troubling to
America’s Sheriffs is that you and your administration were well
aware that this crisis would happen when you ceased construction of
the border wall and changed border security policies.” The law
enforcement officials continue: “Sheriffs were talking with the
Obama/Biden administration about these same concerns that we were
experiencing at the time based on the lax policies then being
implemented. In fact, America’s Sheriffs attended meetings in
Washington with then-Undersecretary of Homeland Security (DHS)
Alejandro Mayorkas, who is now your Secretary of Homeland Security.
You and he are fully aware of what illegal immigration does to our
citizens, legal residents and our communities.”

Among the letter’s signatories are sheriffs in Alabama, Arizona,
Florida, Georgia, Idaho, Iowa, Kansas, Louisiana, Maryland, Michigan,
Nebraska, Nevada, North Carolina, and Texas to name a few. Even
sheriffs, who are typically elected to head county law enforcement
agencies, in states that broadly offer illegal immigrants sanctuary
signed the letter. They include several in California, Colorado,
Massachusetts, Oregon, New Jersey, Illinois, Oregon, and Vermont.
“You may imagine how violated America’s Sheriffs feel that you
unleashed a predictable crisis upon our nation that puts those we
promised to protect at risk of grave danger,” the cops write to the
commander-in-chief. “America’s Sheriffs will not defy our oaths.
We will not join with those who suggest that we ignore existing laws
in collusion with those elected officials who arbitrarily feel that
they should be excused from being accountable and required to follow
our laws. To do so would violate the promise of America’s Sheriffs
to those who bestowed upon us the honor and privilege to represent
their safety and security concerns.”

The officials continue by writing that Americans expect them to uphold
and enforce the rule of law and assure that they will uphold the oath
to do so. “In the interests of ending the undermining of our laws
and the increased risks to the safety and security of the people of
the United States of America, we respectfully request that you
immediately reverse course on your pro-illegal immigration policies,
resume the border wall construction, and embrace the common-sense,
public-safety-supporting border policies of the previous
administration.” The Obama and Trump administrations “recognized
the threats and dangers presented by illegal immigration,” the law
enforcement officials write, adding that it is “critically
important” that Biden see it as well.

The sheriff who wrote the letter, Thomas M. Hodgson in Bristol County,
Massachusetts, sent it to his counterparts throughout the U.S. and 275
sheriffs in 39 states quickly signed it. Hodgson authored it after
government figures revealed a record number of illegal immigrant
minors entered the country from Mexico. Around the same time, the U.S.
Border Patrol disclosed that it arrested more than twice as many
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55693&L=22645&F=T&]
criminal
migrants in the first six months of fiscal year 2021 than it did in
all of 2020. In the first half of this fiscal year, the Border Patrol
apprehended 5,018 “criminal aliens
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55693&L=24898&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuY2JwLmdvdi9uZXdzcm9vbS9zdGF0cy9jYnAtZW5mb3JjZW1lbnQtc3RhdGlzdGljcy9jcmltaW5hbC1hbGllbi1zdGF0aXN0aWNzXeKAnT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDUxNTAwMTIxNg==
compared
to 2,438 in all of fiscal year 2020. The agency defines criminal
aliens as individuals who have been convicted of one or more crimes,
whether in the U.S. or abroad, prior to interdiction by federal
agents.

MAXINE WATERS AND CONGRESSIONAL SPECIAL SECURITY DEMANDS PUTS
AMERICANS AT RISK

Reasonable security for congressmen and other public officials is
necessary, but it shouldn’t come at the direct expense of the safety
and protection of Americans. But that’s exactly what is happening.
Here are the shocking details
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55693&L=24899&F=T&]
from our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog.

Federal Air Marshals (FAM) were yanked from a high-risk flight so
Congresswoman Maxine Waters could have extra security during a recent
trip to Minnesota, though she was already covered by a four-man detail
consisting of two Capitol Police officers and two Secret Service
agents, according to multiple law enforcement sources interviewed by
Judicial Watch. The veteran FAM sources say the California Democrat
had two air marshals reassigned to a plane that would otherwise not
qualify because it was not considered high-risk. The transfer forced
the high-risk flight to complete its trip without the two air marshals
originally assigned to it, said Sonya Hightower-LaBosco, a retired FAM
who serves as executive director of the Air Marshal National Council.
The union represents thousands of air marshals nationwide. “Two air
marshals were pulled off a high-risk flight so Maxine Waters’
aircraft could have six armed agents,” Hightower-LaBosco said,
adding that two additional armed agents met the congresswoman on the
ground.

FAMs are federal law enforcement officers whose primary function is
to protect commercial passenger flights
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55693&L=24900&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9qb2JzLnRzYS5nb3YvbGF3LWVuZm9yY2VtZW50P3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNTE1MDAxMjE2]
by deterring and countering
the risk of terrorist activity, aircraft piracy and other crimes to
protect the nation’s transportation infrastructure. However, a
special “VIP” program launched about a year ago allows members of
Congress to get extra protection even though they often already travel
with plenty of security on flights that do not meet the threat
criteria, usually determined by the FBI, for air marshals. The program
“has left a glaring hole in America’s aviation security,”
according to a whistleblower complaint filed this year by the Air
Marshal National Council with the Department of Homeland Security
(DHS) Inspector General. “Recently, the Federal Air Marshal service
has assigned a full-time position at the Capitol in Washington D.C. to
take requests from Congressional members for Federal Air Marshal
coverage of flights these Congressional members are on,” the
document, which is also addressed to DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas,
states. “The FAMS are now taking agents off of regularly scheduled
high risk flights to put them on flights with members of Congress,
that in most cases have their own armed federal security details
onboard already. It has become akin to a type of extremely expensive
concierge service for Congressional members.” The document cites the
recent Waters request as an example, confirming what other sources
told Judicial Watch, that “FAMS were pulled off of a scheduled
high-risk flight to cover” the congresswoman’s plane.

Waters received the extra security while traveling to Minnesota in
mid-April to support protestors in Brooklyn Center, a Minneapolis
suburb, after police shot and killed a black man with an open warrant
related to an aggravated armed robbery
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55693&L=24901&F=T&].
The
Derek Chauvin trial was wrapping up around 10 miles away and the
82-year-old lawmaker incited the crowd, encouraging protestors
to “get more confrontational
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55693&L=24902&F=T&
if
the former Minneapolis cop was not convicted of murder for George
Floyd’s death. “We gotta stay on the street, we’ve got to get
more active, we’ve got to get more confrontational, we’ve got to
make sure that they know that we mean business,” Waters said ahead
of closing arguments in Chauvin’s trial. The former officer was
convicted and the judge presiding over the trial called the
congresswoman’s comments “abhorrent
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=55693&L=24903&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9hcG5ld3MuY29tL2FydGljbGUvbWF4aW5lLXdhdGVycy1jb21tZW50cy1kZXJlay1jaGF1dmluLXRyaWFsLWM3ODEzNzA3OTYyYzlmNzIzYzc1ZGI1NDYwNWJhZDJjXS7igJ0/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA1MTUwMDEyMTY=

Judicial Watch is investigating Waters’ special security arrangement
and has filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request with DHS for
documents associated with the April 17 Delta Airlines flight from
Washington D.C.’s Dulles International Airport to
Minneapolis–Saint Paul International Airport. In the public-record
request, Judicial Watch writes that Waters raised the potential for
violence, directed lawlessness, and may have interfered with a
co-equal branch of government. Furthermore, Judicial Watch points out
that it is still not known what authorized official government
business the congresswoman, who represents Los Angeles in the House,
was attending in Minnesota and the appearance is her travel was for
personal gain. “How do you go out and promote defunding the police
then call for more police protection,” said Hightower-LaBosco, a
former police officer who served 12 years as an air marshal.
Hightower-Bosco says the estimated cost of Waters’ security detail
is about $10,000 for each leg.
Until next week,

Consider the Pentagon and Tucker Carlson of Fox News. In the March 9, 2021, broadcast of “Tucker Carlson Tonight,” Carlson said [=], in criticizing a “woke” public relations push by the military: So we’ve got new hairstyles and maternity flight suits. Pregnant women are going to fight our wars. It’s a mockery of the U.S. military. Well, China’s military becomes more masculine as it’s assembled the world’s largest navy.... It’s a mockery of the U.S. military. Pentagon spokesman John Kirby said that Defense Secretary Austin was “revulsed [== by Carlson’s comments. Official military Twitter accounts were also used to attack [] Carlson’s views. What was going on behind the scenes at the Pentagon? To find out we filed a FOIA suit against the Department of Defense seeking communications between Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin and other top military officials regarding Fox News and Carlson, whose recent commentary on the U.S. military was attacked by top Pentagon officials (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Department of Defense [==] (No. 1:21-cv-01225)). We sued here in federal court after the Department of Defense failed to reply to our March 16, 2021, request for: All emails sent between Secretary of Defense Lloyd Austin and email accounts ending in .gov and/or .mil containing the terms “Tucker Carlson” and/or “Fox News.” All emails sent between Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Gen. Mark Milley and email accounts ending in .gov and/or .mil containing the terms “Tucker Carlson” and/or “Fox News.” All emails sent between Vice Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Gen. John Hyten and email accounts ending in .gov and/or .mil containing the terms “Tucker Carlson” and/or “Fox News.” We’re asking for emails sent between March 1, 2021, and March 16, 2021. On his March 11 show, Carlson accused the Pentagon [=] of declaring “war on a domestic news operation:” Since when does the Pentagon declare war on a domestic news operation? We can’t remember that ever happening. But we’re going to pass on that, because this is bigger than a feud with some flack at the Pentagon. This is genuinely worrisome. Texas Republican Sen. Ted Cruz sent a letter [==] to Defense Secretary Austin demanding a meeting with the Commandant of the Marine Corps to account for the attacks on Carlson and “a plan to prevent other military units from being similarly mobilized against the speech of American citizens.” In the letter, Sen. Cruz wrote: I am deeply troubled that the comments you made, and the military’s broader obligation to avoid political endorsements and controversy, are being systematically undermined for the sake of leftwing ideology and political expediency. The last week has witnessed the Pentagon mobilize systematic, public attacks against television host Tucker Carlson that in substance, tone, and political resonance are inexplicably inappropriate. The Department of Defense has rules about how members of the U.S. military can participate in politics. Active military members may express a personal opinion on political candidates and issues, but they cannot [=] express opinions on behalf of or as a representative of the U.S. military. We are deeply disturbed over the Pentagon’s illicit secrecy about its coordinated attacks on the First Amendment-protected speech of Tucker Carlson. To sum up, we asked the Pentagon to search two weeks’ worth of email, in three accounts, using two search terms. And they stonewalled. The fact that we must take the Pentagon to federal court for these documents suggests the agency has something to hide. ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION OVERWHELMS SHERIFFS; FAMILIES EXPOSED TO GANG VIOLENCE As the corrupt media is focused on promoting the anti-Trump politician Liz Cheney, the deadly dangerous Biden border crisis continues unabated. But sheriffs of many counties across the country are making a stand for the rule of law, our sovereignty, and the rule of law -- as our Corruption Chronicles blog reports [=]. Local law enforcement agencies nationwide are overwhelmed with criminal activity linked to a huge increase in illegal immigration, and families are being exposed to violence associated with drug trafficking and transnational gangs, according to hundreds of sheriffs across the United States. In a letter [==] to President Joe Biden, the law enforcement officials in more than two dozen states blast the administration’s “reckless and irresponsible” open border policies that are exposing innocent citizens to illegal alien violence. Titled, “Help America’s Sheriffs Keep Our Neighborhoods and Communities Safe by Halting Illegal Immigration,” the document asserts that the crisis began when Biden was vice president. “In a myriad of ways, you and your administration are encouraging and sanctioning lawlessness and the victimization of the people of the United States of America, all in the name of mass illegal immigration,” the sheriffs write. “What is most troubling to America’s Sheriffs is that you and your administration were well aware that this crisis would happen when you ceased construction of the border wall and changed border security policies.” The law enforcement officials continue: “Sheriffs were talking with the Obama/Biden administration about these same concerns that we were experiencing at the time based on the lax policies then being implemented. In fact, America’s Sheriffs attended meetings in Washington with then-Undersecretary of Homeland Security (DHS) Alejandro Mayorkas, who is now your Secretary of Homeland Security. You and he are fully aware of what illegal immigration does to our citizens, legal residents and our communities.” Among the letter’s signatories are sheriffs in Alabama, Arizona, Florida, Georgia, Idaho, Iowa, Kansas, Louisiana, Maryland, Michigan, Nebraska, Nevada, North Carolina, and Texas to name a few. Even sheriffs, who are typically elected to head county law enforcement agencies, in states that broadly offer illegal immigrants sanctuary signed the letter. They include several in California, Colorado, Massachusetts, Oregon, New Jersey, Illinois, Oregon, and Vermont. “You may imagine how violated America’s Sheriffs feel that you unleashed a predictable crisis upon our nation that puts those we promised to protect at risk of grave danger,” the cops write to the commander-in-chief. “America’s Sheriffs will not defy our oaths. We will not join with those who suggest that we ignore existing laws in collusion with those elected officials who arbitrarily feel that they should be excused from being accountable and required to follow our laws. To do so would violate the promise of America’s Sheriffs to those who bestowed upon us the honor and privilege to represent their safety and security concerns.” The officials continue by writing that Americans expect them to uphold and enforce the rule of law and assure that they will uphold the oath to do so. “In the interests of ending the undermining of our laws and the increased risks to the safety and security of the people of the United States of America, we respectfully request that you immediately reverse course on your pro-illegal immigration policies, resume the border wall construction, and embrace the common-sense, public-safety-supporting border policies of the previous administration.” The Obama and Trump administrations “recognized the threats and dangers presented by illegal immigration,” the law enforcement officials write, adding that it is “critically important” that Biden see it as well. The sheriff who wrote the letter, Thomas M. Hodgson in Bristol County, Massachusetts, sent it to his counterparts throughout the U.S. and 275 sheriffs in 39 states quickly signed it. Hodgson authored it after government figures revealed a record number of illegal immigrant minors entered the country from Mexico. Around the same time, the U.S. Border Patrol disclosed that it arrested more than twice as many [] criminal migrants in the first six months of fiscal year 2021 than it did in all of 2020. In the first half of this fiscal year, the Border Patrol apprehended 5,018 “criminal aliens [== compared to 2,438 in all of fiscal year 2020. The agency defines criminal aliens as individuals who have been convicted of one or more crimes, whether in the U.S. or abroad, prior to interdiction by federal agents. MAXINE WATERS AND CONGRESSIONAL SPECIAL SECURITY DEMANDS PUTS AMERICANS AT RISK Reasonable security for congressmen and other public officials is necessary, but it shouldn’t come at the direct expense of the safety and protection of Americans. But that’s exactly what is happening. Here are the shocking details [] from our Corruption Chronicles blog. Federal Air Marshals (FAM) were yanked from a high-risk flight so Congresswoman Maxine Waters could have extra security during a recent trip to Minnesota, though she was already covered by a four-man detail consisting of two Capitol Police officers and two Secret Service agents, according to multiple law enforcement sources interviewed by Judicial Watch. The veteran FAM sources say the California Democrat had two air marshals reassigned to a plane that would otherwise not qualify because it was not considered high-risk. The transfer forced the high-risk flight to complete its trip without the two air marshals originally assigned to it, said Sonya Hightower-LaBosco, a retired FAM who serves as executive director of the Air Marshal National Council. The union represents thousands of air marshals nationwide. “Two air marshals were pulled off a high-risk flight so Maxine Waters’ aircraft could have six armed agents,” Hightower-LaBosco said, adding that two additional armed agents met the congresswoman on the ground. FAMs are federal law enforcement officers whose primary function is to protect commercial passenger flights [] by deterring and countering the risk of terrorist activity, aircraft piracy and other crimes to protect the nation’s transportation infrastructure. However, a special “VIP” program launched about a year ago allows members of Congress to get extra protection even though they often already travel with plenty of security on flights that do not meet the threat criteria, usually determined by the FBI, for air marshals. The program “has left a glaring hole in America’s aviation security,” according to a whistleblower complaint filed this year by the Air Marshal National Council with the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) Inspector General. “Recently, the Federal Air Marshal service has assigned a full-time position at the Capitol in Washington D.C. to take requests from Congressional members for Federal Air Marshal coverage of flights these Congressional members are on,” the document, which is also addressed to DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas, states. “The FAMS are now taking agents off of regularly scheduled high risk flights to put them on flights with members of Congress, that in most cases have their own armed federal security details onboard already. It has become akin to a type of extremely expensive concierge service for Congressional members.” The document cites the recent Waters request as an example, confirming what other sources told Judicial Watch, that “FAMS were pulled off of a scheduled high-risk flight to cover” the congresswoman’s plane. Waters received the extra security while traveling to Minnesota in mid-April to support protestors in Brooklyn Center, a Minneapolis suburb, after police shot and killed a black man with an open warrant related to an aggravated armed robbery [=]. The Derek Chauvin trial was wrapping up around 10 miles away and the 82-year-old lawmaker incited the crowd, encouraging protestors to “get more confrontational [ if the former Minneapolis cop was not convicted of murder for George Floyd’s death. “We gotta stay on the street, we’ve got to get more active, we’ve got to get more confrontational, we’ve got to make sure that they know that we mean business,” Waters said ahead of closing arguments in Chauvin’s trial. The former officer was convicted and the judge presiding over the trial called the congresswoman’s comments “abhorrent [= Judicial Watch is investigating Waters’ special security arrangement and has filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request with DHS for documents associated with the April 17 Delta Airlines flight from Washington D.C.’s Dulles International Airport to Minneapolis–Saint Paul International Airport. In the public-record request, Judicial Watch writes that Waters raised the potential for violence, directed lawlessness, and may have interfered with a co-equal branch of government. Furthermore, Judicial Watch points out that it is still not known what authorized official government business the congresswoman, who represents Los Angeles in the House, was attending in Minnesota and the appearance is her travel was for personal gain. “How do you go out and promote defunding the police then call for more police protection,” said Hightower-LaBosco, a former police officer who served 12 years as an air marshal. Hightower-Bosco says the estimated cost of Waters’ security detail is about $10,000 for each leg. Until next week, [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [==] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2021, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: AOC called the Police on Me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57398611:6NDap8ltN:m:1:3103520637:EDEF8248DE88DDC1FB826150C425C58F:r "Headline") Peter, Everyone be careful, AOC has been triggered. I tried to talk to her the other day, and she literally ran away, and then called the police on me. According to AOC, who champions the defund movement, Congress isn't a "safe space," so a five-foot two-inch woman is scary when she asks you a few questions:
* Why do you hate America?
* Why do you support Antifa?
* Why do you support Hamas terrorists?
* When are you going to debate me on your Green New Deal proposals?

**Now her friend Nancy Pelosi wants me referred to the House Ethics Committee! All for the crime of asking a few questions. Is this still America!?!** **[I need your help to fight back! Will you make your most generous donation of $25, $50 or $100, and help me fend off the radical left attack machine here in Congress?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57398612:6NDap8ltN:m:1:3103520637:EDEF8248DE88DDC1FB826150C425C58F:r "I need your help to fight back!
Will you make your most generous donation of $25, $50 or $100, and help me fend off the radical left attack machine here in Congress?")** I'm not Liz Cheney or Mitch McConnell. **I wasn't sent here by the people of Georgia's 14 th District to hold hands and sip tea - I was sent here to fight for our liberty and to stop the slide towards socialism.** I'm here to stop the radical left from destroying our nation and I'm going to confront them on why they have such divergent ideas. I'm quite certain the American people want us discussing ideas, not coddling up to illegal aliens or Hamas terrorists killing innocent children in Israel. _Any Member of Congress who is siding with terrorists over our friends in Israel is literally committing treason. What 's Pelosi doing about that?_ **[I need your help to fight AOC and the radical leftists in Congress! Please donate $50 or more and help me hold them accountable for trying to destroy our nation!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57398613:6NDap8ltN:m:1:3103520637:EDEF8248DE88DDC1FB826150C425C58F:r "I need your help to fight AOC and the radical leftists in Congress!
Please donate $50 or more and help me hold them accountable for trying to destroy our nation!")** That's right - the same woman who wants to take away your right to own a gun, and defund the police in your neighborhood, [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57398611:6NDap8ltN:m:1:3103520637:EDEF8248DE88DDC1FB826150C425C58F:r "Tweet")**needs armed security and the entire House Ethics Committee to protect her from people asking her questions she doesn't like.** This is what Democrats do when you try to hold them accountable - they hide behind armed guards and call you a racist. They are hypocrites, and they don't scare me. **[If you aren't scared either, then I need you to help me send a message. I am looking for 402 Brave Patriots to stand with me in the next 24 hours and let the leftists know we aggressively champion freedom. Any donation from $5 to $2,900 adds your name to this list.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57398611:6NDap8ltN:m:1:3103520637:EDEF8248DE88DDC1FB826150C425C58F:r "If
you aren't scared either, then I need you to help me send a message. I am looking for 402 Brave Patriots to stand with me in the next 24 hours and
let the leftists know we aggressively champion freedom. Any donation from $5 to $2,900 adds your name to this list.")** **Together, we will send a message that the snowflakes won't be able to hide from.** AOC is a grown woman - she needs to start acting like it! She needs to start taking the advice of an old Democrat, President Harry Truman, who once said, " If you can't stand the heat, get out of the kitchen!" She can go back to her old job at the bar if she doesn't have the guts to face me, because I love this nation, and I will never stop fighting to preserve our liberty. I don't care if the press calls me a "meany" or I have to hurt someone's feelings to do so, but I'm not going to let them destroy our nation or implement socialism. **[Will you help me hold AOC accountable? I need to know if you are standing with me TODAY!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57398611:6NDap8ltN:m:1:3103520637:EDEF8248DE88DDC1FB826150C425C58F:r "Will you help me hold AOC
accountable? I need to know if you are standing with me TODAY!")** God Bless America, [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57398611:6NDap8ltN:m:1:3103520637:EDEF8248DE88DDC1FB826150C425C58F:r "Marjorie
Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

I'm quite certain the American people want us discussing ideas, not coddling up to illegal aliens or Hamas terrorists killing innocent children in Israel. Any Member of Congress who is siding with terrorists over our friends in Israel is literally committing treason. What 's Pelosi doing about that? "I need your help to fight AOC and the radical leftists in Congress! Please donate $50 or more and help me hold them accountable for trying to destroy our nation!" That's right - the same woman who wants to take away your right to own a gun, and defund the police in your neighborhood, "Tweet"needs armed security and the entire House Ethics Committee to protect her from people asking her questions she doesn't like. This is what Democrats do when you try to hold them accountable - they hide behind armed guards and call you a racist. They are hypocrites, and they don't scare me. "If you aren't scared either, then I need you to help me send a message. I am looking for 402 Brave Patriots to stand with me in the next 24 hours and let the leftists know we aggressively champion freedom. Any donation from $5 to $2,900 adds your name to this list." Together, we will send a message that the snowflakes won't be able to hide from. AOC is a grown woman - she needs to start acting like it! She needs to start taking the advice of an old Democrat, President Harry Truman, who once said, " If you can't stand the heat, get out of the kitchen!" She can go back to her old job at the bar if she doesn't have the guts to face me, because I love this nation, and I will never stop fighting to preserve our liberty. I don't care if the press calls me a "meany" or I have to hurt someone's feelings to do so, but I'm not going to let them destroy our nation or implement socialism. "Will you help me hold AOC accountable? I need to know if you are standing with me TODAY!" God Bless America, "Marjorie Taylor Greene" Marjorie Taylor Greene Congresswoman (R-GA) | PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC. Please take a minute to read the special message from our sponsor. Sponsorships like this one help us keep our news service free of charge. The sponsorship above reflects the opinions & representations of the advertiser, & not necessarily the opinion of USA Freedom Fighters.

body:
We can ABSOLUTELY close the gap in the next few hours alone!!!
#
Hi, it’s Erica.
I know Jayla and the team kept you updated. But with our mid-month fundraising deadline at MIDNIGHT, I wanted you to hear the latest update directly from me:
**As of 9:00 AM ET this morning, we are only $269 behind our mid-month fundraising goal!!!**
We can absolutely close the gap in the next few hours alone, y’all. You’re an awesome part of our scrappy grassroots team, and I’m hoping I can count on you today:
**Will you please make a contribution of any amount to our campaign before 11:59 PM ET tonight?**
You can give directly at this link, or click the button below: **[_https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-em20210515-1_](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1060?refcode=em20210515-92&t=1&akid=92%2E3698%2ElPguiK)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1060?refcode=em20210515-92&t=20&akid=92%2E3698%2ElPguiK)**
Together, we will build a grassroots campaign for a different North Carolina — one that loves us back the same way we love it!!!
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate
P.S. **Y'all, when I say our campaign is scrappy, I REALLY mean it.** The reason you get so many emails from me and my team is honestly because we rely on people like you chipping in to emails like this. And we’re doing it all without taking a dime from corporate PACs or fossil fuel companies!!! [**_Please consider making a contribution to our campaign before 11:59 PM ET tonight._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/1060?refcode=em20210515-92&t=21&akid=92%2E3698%2ElPguiK)

Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

It's exactly why we are running in this MUST WIN Texas Special Election Runoff. The fate of our country is on the line, and I won't sit by and do nothing.
[**That's why I'm humbly asking for you to help out by chipping in just $5 today to fuel our grassroots campaign and bring some sanity back to Washington.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9673126/224717773/200355/3/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=5f9d32be)
Look, I don't ask for help unless it's critical -- _**and right now it is.**_
_Our opponents are spending heavily to stop me from winning this race_ \-- and I'm not afraid of political attacks, but I do know it's 100% vital that we can respond.
I don't back down from a challenge -- so please join us by chipping in right now:

body:
This could seriously be a thing.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29212048/285683577/-2023814932?refcode=20210515_TA_5AL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzlmM2E3ZS04ZGI1LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=16dLmOL5f0iAbyVSSBCNBH0Ff9baI8djqW4bPmgmhEo=)

| | Derek,

Here’s the GOP’s worst kept secret: Donald Trump still wants to run for President in 2024. His first test? Helping Glenn Youngkin become Virginia’s Governor in 2021.

And Derek, I hate to say it but he is off to a strong start. His hand-picked candidate, Glenn Youngkin, promised that he’d spend $75 million of his own fortune to buy the Governor’s office and top election forecasters are saying this race will be a toss-up.

With unlimited resources, history on his side, and the complete backing of the Republican establishment, Youngkin has a clear path to the Governor’s office AND to establishing a foothold for Trumpism here in Virginia.

**[To stop Trump in 2024, we have to stop Youngkin in November. Can we count on you to chip in any amount right now? Virginia Republicans are already outraising us 2:1.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29212049/285683578/-2023814932?refcode=20210515_TA_5AL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzlmM2E3ZS04ZGI1LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=16dLmOL5f0iAbyVSSBCNBH0Ff9baI8djqW4bPmgmhEo=)**

Terry led the charge in Virginia to defeat Trump in 2020. He is fired up to do the same against Glenn. But we need to have his back right now before we fall too far behind.

clean_body: This could seriously be a thing. | | | = | | Derek, Here’s the GOP’s worst kept secret: Donald Trump still wants to run for President in 2024. His first test? Helping Glenn Youngkin become Virginia’s Governor in 2021. And Derek, I hate to say it but he is off to a strong start. His hand-picked candidate, Glenn Youngkin, promised that he’d spend $75 million of his own fortune to buy the Governor’s office and top election forecasters are saying this race will be a toss-up. With unlimited resources, history on his side, and the complete backing of the Republican establishment, Youngkin has a clear path to the Governor’s office AND to establishing a foothold for Trumpism here in Virginia. = Terry led the charge in Virginia to defeat Trump in 2020. He is fired up to do the same against Glenn. But we need to have his back right now before we fall too far behind. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Team Terry = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 31408 Alexandria, VA 22310 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

Friends,

I'm alarmed by what's happening with the Republican Party -- and frankly, you should be, too.

Liz Cheney is one of the most conservative members of the House, but we all know right-wing ideology and policy no longer matter to today's GOP.

Fealty to Donald Trump. That's officially all that matters.

House Republicans voted to oust Cheney from their leadership team because she wouldn't stay silent in the face of a dangerous lie that's gotten people killed. She simply told the truth -- Trump lost in a free and fair election. Trump's incitement of a violent insurrection was an impeachable offense.

And if you dare to question Trump and the big lie that the 2020 election was stolen, like Cheney did, the Republicans will silence you.

It's never mattered more for us to fight back against a Republican Party that is rapidly evolving into an autocratic cult. If one party in a two-party system can simply refuse to acknowledge when the other party wins an election, then our democracy is in peril.

We can't afford to lose our Democratic majorities to Kevin McCarthy or Mitch McConnell.

We’re just $4,621 short of where we need to be by tonight, but I know with your help, we can get there.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29214727/285694646/-1191835590?refcode=EM_FR_210515MMFR_N_AL_90DA_7_NG_TestB_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjhkMDg2NC05M2I1LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4SQiWrCyeTR4navf5ElxCz0iPokCvGfnngCp-XQ9ECc=)**

I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again, we need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. And I have a proven record that shows progressive values are good for business:

I brought together the public/private partnership to build the Bucks Arena and the Deer District surrounding the arena. As part of the agreement, I led the workforce development efforts to make sure that people often left out of major construction work got a chance to expand skills, find jobs, and build wealth.

Our plan required 40% of workers on the project to consist of people underemployed or unemployed for the previous five years and at least 25% of service contracts to be awarded to minority and/or disadvantaged businesses -- and we surpassed these requirements while also ensuring 80% of the materials used in the construction were sourced from Wisconsin.

**While others just talk about raising wages, I turned my words into actions.** I led negotiations for a historic project labor agreement that included provisions to hire women and minorities that are often underrepresented among union workers, and we also ensured a $15 minimum wage for all arena workers once it was built.

I've put progressive values into action, and now I’m running to unseat Ron Johnson and strengthen our Senate majority. And I’m asking for your support today.

And I have a proven record that shows progressive values are good for business: I brought together the public/private partnership to build the Bucks Arena and the Deer District surrounding the arena. As part of the agreement, I led the workforce development efforts to make sure that people often left out of major construction work got a chance to expand skills, find jobs, and build wealth. Our plan required 40% of workers on the project to consist of people underemployed or unemployed for the previous five years and at least 25% of service contracts to be awarded to minority and/or disadvantaged businesses -- and we surpassed these requirements while also ensuring 80% of the materials used in the construction were sourced from Wisconsin. While others just talk about raising wages, I turned my words into actions. I led negotiations for a historic project labor agreement that included provisions to hire women and minorities that are often underrepresented among union workers, and we also ensured a $15 minimum wage for all arena workers once it was built. I've put progressive values into action, and now I’m running to unseat Ron Johnson and strengthen our Senate majority. And I’m asking for your support today. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Alex Lasry | ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Alex Lasry has a fresh perspective and record of actually getting things done. We can beat Ron Johnson by building a grassroots coalition, but it will take all of us. Will you pitch in any amount to help us keep the Senate Majority and defeat Ron Johnson? = Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin Stay connected with Alex's campaign to defeat Ron Johnson: Lasry for Wisconsin P.O. Box 511549 Milwaukee, WI 53203 United States It's going to take everyone on this team to win this election, but if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . If you'd like to stay on our list but receive fewer emails, fill out **.

**NON-NEGOTIABLE DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M.**
---
Friend, our democracy is under attack.
**After passing egregious voter suppression laws in Georgia and Florida, the GOP is setting their sights on battleground Arizona. Arizona's Republican governor just signed a bill that would purge 125,000 voters – including 30,000 Latino voters – from the early voting list, and that was just _one of 23 voter suppression bills_ moving through the state legislature.**

Arizona voters – led by Latino voters – were key to delivering the presidency for Joe Biden and flipping the Senate for Democrats. But if we don't fight back now, these Republican extremists will succeed in silencing our voices and preventing Democrats from ever winning again.

**That's why Marco Lopez (D) – a former Obama administration official and voting rights champion – is running to flip the governorship blue and defeat Republican extremism. He's standing with leaders like Stacey Abrams and Gretchen Whitmer to fight back against GOP-led voter suppression and defend our democracy. **
**But they need our help. It's going to take a MASSIVE surge of grassroots support to overcome extremist Republicans’ efforts to undermine our democracy – and with time running out before our midnight deadline, we still don't know where you stand. Please, friend, Stacey, Gretchen and Marco are counting on you:**

name: Doug Ose
subject: No More BS
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OSE FOR GOVERNOR
body:
There’s nothing Californians value more than honesty and humility. Unfortunately, Gavin Newsom has lost touch with our state values. While our....... Peter, There’s nothing Californians value more than honesty and humility. Unfortunately, Gavin Newsom has lost touch with our state values. While our favorite restaurants and family businesses stayed closed, he dined in California’s fanciest restaurant. While our kids were forced to stay away from their classrooms for a whole year, his kids got to stay in their schools. While California’s homelessness crisis spirals out of control and many of our neighbors struggle to feed their families, he’s relaxing comfortably in his $3.7 million mansion. Pardon my french... but that’s BS. [**Please, chip in to my campaign today to fuel our fight to stop the BS and get California back on track.**](http://links.oseforcalifornia.com/u/click?_t=78684e7b2de84f238080f8985a821465&_m=02c3631cdb864fe499d8e57ceb1a2e6f&_e=C0mVl2L8zsTrtwXRbf4XNQMaLPeyt2wF2P0hIqvA740qOccM_SWPEoEHS6Tcqp8-fwjlXGhVLolckHxCg0A7SLYVBKm70hhE6gmP3w182A0f-53oladvy5UTEpr3GglqT2oYFbCNmuEOT_VeQDEdY__1GOkjXf7l870JAB4vunljo3jfpw1qdVtdsd3rn1hM9wm-ctizywYNjkPgzsBAPm7UJDJG78hyruT1fRRsJJAF4KKY8XvDSxeynDTjvflb-LkvaqLzrYV2-Qwxx-FA831hSFaXuuEH6PMaei-hOAV2ma3uxE2Bk5c9EtC9fks88uF-cP3-9UkiCSHqAFG2MHVbM0xyNY36NAvb76iqgt7KnFdeV0cfuWQpz9tXtiFctCNx3xCb_LBnmqHyHiZtlqWyZp8PfFi9XcpqEARKky5Ksk6uhqTMS9HPf-2ZUgYf) By now I’m sure you’ve heard of call time. Some folks recommend that elected officials spend **6 to 8 hours a day (!)** calling donors and raising money for their re-election campaigns. Simply put, our broken campaign finance system has made call time a necessary evil to ensure we can stay in Congress and continue our work.
But, that’s a lot of time spent asking for money instead of doing our jobs for the American people. And frankly, it’s not what I was elected to do.
**I was elected to fight for legislation that will make a difference for New Mexico’s workers and families.** And thanks to grassroots donations of $10 or $25 at a time from folks like you, that’s exactly how I get to spend my days in Washington.
That’s why deadlines like this one matter so much. If we can reach our goal by midnight tonight, we’ll have a steady base of funds to rely on and I can spend my time connecting with New Mexicans, supporting candidates who will move our state forward, and advocating for the issues that matter most.
**So, here’s my ask for you — will you pitch in any amount that makes sense for your budget to help us keep pace with our fundraising goals and ensure I can stay focused on the important fights ahead?**

For too long, our government hasn’t worked for working families like mine. It’s allowed the rich to get richer while those below the poverty line stay trapped. It’s permitted dangerous leaders like Donald Trump to fan the flames of white supremacy and racism. And it’s kept too many Americans from having a seat at the table.
**I’m running for Lt. Governor to change that and build a system that works for all Virginians, not just the wealthy few. But I can’t do it without your help.**
Peter, if we are going to win a primary this competitive, we have to reach every single fundraising goal between now and June 8th. Falling short — even by a few dollars — would mean pulling back on our resources when it matters most.
**So, will you pitch in $10 to our historic campaign for Lt. Governor before our mid-month deadline expires tonight? If we’re going to take on the tough fight ahead — and win — we cannot miss this goal.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | Hey Peter — We are so close (so close!) to reaching our critical and final mid-month fundraising deadline before our primary. Will you please add a donation of any amount before midnight? It would mean so much. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = For too long, our government hasn’t worked for working families like mine. It’s allowed the rich to get richer while those below the poverty line stay trapped. It’s permitted dangerous leaders like Donald Trump to fan the flames of white supremacy and racism. And it’s kept too many Americans from having a seat at the table. I’m running for Lt. Governor to change that and build a system that works for all Virginians, not just the wealthy few. But I can’t do it without your help. Peter, if we are going to win a primary this competitive, we have to reach every single fundraising goal between now and June 8th. Falling short — even by a few dollars — would mean pulling back on our resources when it matters most. So, will you pitch in $10 to our historic campaign for Lt. Governor before our mid-month deadline expires tonight? If we’re going to take on the tough fight ahead — and win — we cannot miss this goal. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thanks for standing by me. I am so grateful for your support. — Hala As a lifelong Virginian, Hala understands where we’ve come from and embodies the diversity of our future. She’s running for Lt. Governor because she knows we have the power to move forward together, and she knows what it’ll take to get it done. Will you pitch in to join our movement for a brighter future for all? | = | Paid for by Hala for Virginia Hala for Virginia P.O. Box 7434 Woodbridge, VA 22195 United States

subject: update

body:
Peter,
James here, Stewart’s Finance Director. I just finished up our weekly finance meeting with updates on how we’re doing this month and I’ll be honest: we’re slowing down .
Our competition will have huge sums of money waiting to be spent and if they sustain their pace, it is going to be difficult for us to catch up. So I’m asking for 200 donations before midnight to get us back to where we need to be in this race. Will you step up today with a $10 donation? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210515-email&amount=10]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $10 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210515-email&express_lane=true&amount=10] DONATE $25 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210515-email&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210515-email&express_lane=true&amount=50] DONATE $100 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210515-email&express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE $250 NOW! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210515-email&express_lane=true&amount=250] ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210515-email]
The 2022 Elections may seem far away, but they can be won or lost this year and I’ll admit that although I’m a good Finance Director, I can’t do it alone.
I need you.
Help us get back on track so that we can send Stewart to Congress by chipping in $25 right now! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210515-email&amount=25]
It’s plain to see that Washington and Virginia’s First District desperately need Stewart’s leadership and problem-solving skills to lead us through this pandemic and to prosperity on the other side.
Give any amount to Stewart’s campaign using this secure link: http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210515-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2105-q2-sn?refcode=210515-email]
Thanks, y’all!
Best,
James Hartnett
Finance Director
Stewart Navarre for Congress

body:
****
I've been trying to reach you.
************

Friend, this is Congresswoman Elise Stefanik. Did you get my message?
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Elise Stefanik <[**info@rslc.gop**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=0bf6221f8b12422d9eb6c7b4892c02cd&_e=ISQBaNKQVNsVnDF0vOut8QO0_nXLSKUpr-nQQnlKspF01gTzetYCK2JDqaxz2GmdTR_h3WRXNC5_nDkIrl5ERclIY1vy1EqL0XQ1H4oBWVYYBRXQdsfZbKhP0OGAfLOvwFpikneSxK78rOP1CqcDBU3XR8pRzR2GCt5mvexuH2DyG-EfYD2sk1D5yFyUkF1sQH1cAqD1y9pDJguWRm-K0iIz9gSY0hTNQUiUhVMeT9DNd_uTUc_CKsdYoxhg8bXVqX_75p1KBhlkLfCQnFDlg5EE0o3YARUYp3ZLq2KlDS1gX__Fz_OXjsmpuJNr0u5HH1izU9d2f7ci7aIc51ar-32ikAktndB40auk_qu61oWfvMUBc94Aq2nS91Z3QBi1_Hm9f1m9HzWyCMx_r3zGNdQ99bODsT-v0cmCbBzGdWzKPmHkpzWz3IsyZdJwwMEDZ5eg1q46azj45sVVJ6az5A4l8vAaoNz9rPdIJOkVIQuU9pO1niYq4N4Lsw79ux-eMnNkXG9ZkiEKUj1-JD42eamWMll_f6KQFcpCjdNiBLI%3D)>
Date: Wednesday May 12, 2021
Subject: This is serious
**Friend, this is Congresswoman Elise Stefanik. I need your help!**

name: Team Bartos
subject: **For Immediate Release**
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bartos for US Senate |
body:
GROWING LIST OF GOP OFFICIALS SAY BARTOS BEST CHANCE TO WIN SENATE SEAT | |
---
**GROWING LIST OF GOP OFFICIALS URGE PARNELL TO RUN FOR CONGRESS; SAY BARTOS BEST CHANCE TO WIN SENATE SEAT**
|
---
"2022 presents our party a remarkable chance to take back the House and the Senate. And the mission to take back both of those chambers starts right here in Pennsylvania.

As County Chairs and Elected Officials of the Pennsylvania Republican Party, we know better than most that these opportunities are rare, and we **have to **capitalize when they come around.

We have two phenomenal candidates who can win two must-win seats.

Sean Parnell came close to beating Conor Lamb in Pennsylvania's 17th Congressional District in 2020 and if we unite behind Sean early, we know 2022 will be a different story. Sean Parnell is our best chance to win PA-17 and take back a seat that should be in Republican control.

Jeff Bartos was our Lieutenant Governor nominee in 2018, and since then has launched a non-profit helping save Pennsylvania small businesses. Jeff's Pennsylvania 30 Day Fund has raised over $3.4 million and saved over 1,000 small businesses in Pennsylvania, a perfect contrast to the Democrat Party's lockdown policies that put working families out of a job. Jeff Bartos is our best chance to win the Pennsylvania U.S. Senate seat and put our party on the path back to the majority.

With Sean Parnell running for the House and Jeff Bartos running for the Senate, our party will be in the best possible position to succeed in 2022."
Signed,
**Jackie Kulback **
_Cambria County Chair_

**Jim Foreman**
_Blair County Chair_

**Arleen Multhauf**
_Clearfield County Chair_

**Randy Keefer**
_Fulton County Chair_

**Mary Baker**
_Columbia County Chair_

**Sen. Dan Laughlin**
_Pennsylvania SD-49_

**Sen. Pat Stefano**
_Pennsylvania SD-32_

**Rep. Dawn Keefer**
_Pennsylvania HD-92_

**Rep. Torren Ecker**
_Pennsylvania HD-193_
**Rep. Jesse Topper
** _Pennsylvania HD-78_

**Bill Kozlovich**
_Fayette County Chair_

**Dick Harris**
_Bradford County Chair_

**Jim Smith**
_Mifflin County Chair_

**Joe Vichot**
_Lehigh County Chair_

**Sen. Judy Ward**
_Pennsylvania SD-30_

**Sen. Bob Mensch**
Pennsylvania SD-24

**Sen. Wayne Langerholc**
_Pennsylvania SD-35_

**Rep. Tommy Sankey**
_Pennsylvania HD-73_

**Rep. John Hershey**
_Pennsylvania HD-82_

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
We are currently dangerously behind on our goal and we only have until 11:59 PM to reach it.

Patriot, did you see my team's email yesterday?

They reached out asking for your support ahead of our CRITICAL mid-month deadline!

We are currently dangerously behind on our goal and we only have until 11:59 PM to reach it.

[**Due to the stakes being so high, I have authorized my team to unlock 500% MATCHING on all support rushed before our deadline.**](https://secure.winred.com/btvf/mid-month-deadline/?amount=25&recurring=true&utm_campaign=20210515_TY-2.101720_senator-marsha-blackburn_t1063844-1043&utm_medium=emailp&utm_source=TY-2.101720&utm_content=20210515_emergency-500-matching-unlocked)

clean_body: We're down to the wire and you haven't let us down before: ** . == Friend, We have an urgent question because we are down to the wire and you haven't let us down before: == Right now, Pelosi and her dark money machine are sending money to the Far Left opponent that Michelle beat in 2020. They outspent Michelle 3 to 1 in 2020 ... what's worse is they are on track to spend even more next time around. Michelle is a top target for the Democrats to unseat in Congress in 2022, so we must have the support of every conservative to keep her seat RED and to retake the House Majority. == == | == == == == If Michelle is able to REACH or SURPASS her fundraising goals, she will have the resources to hold back Democrat attacks and continue to be a voice for conservatives in Congress. If not, it will be more of the same: Pelosi holding power and silencing conservatives.** == Team Steel HQ With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@conservativevictory2020.net powered by

body:
I've been trying to reach you.
****
Friend, this is Congresswoman Elise Stefanik. Did you get my message?

Date: Wednesday May 12, 2021
Subject: This is serious
**Friend, this is Congresswoman Elise Stefanik. I need your help!**
It's been a tough few months so far with Democrats in control, but we must not lose hope. We must start laying the foundations for a **RED WAVE** in 2022, and we must win CRITICAL special elections coming up across the country.

name: Jake Oakman
subject: Debt 📉 Indiana’s Future 📈
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Under Governor Holcomb’s leadership, Hoosiers haven’t just weathered the economic turmoil of COVID-19. We’ve emerged stronger than ever before, and... | |
---
|
---
Friend,

✅ Paid off current debt and avoided future debt to the tune of $1.6 billion.

✅ Kept more than $2 billion in state reserves.

✅ Maintained our AAA credit rating.

Indiana’s latest budget is a testament to Governor Holcomb’s forward-thinking, conservative fiscal management –– and the effects of these decisions will be felt _decades_ down the road.

[**[WATCH] Governor Holcomb Outlines Indiana’s Strong Fiscal Position**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=998048b76f8d4d4184cee8911c18c919&_e=C7MwNB6XFbMc6F-90hPpZ9TOKKio3cmzjEAyOFSs7NYLX8svEgsHu2yolcN9b2Hj_g3qlijK187jqwtscPm3z0tnf-DDb3vts1-RLnTR7E1RLRjaYgPxJWMCcplnn6L_08ORLOj2LfURvpCfbkyfcl-qyAThuIzQGBY8KuHlMhC3fzLUnSrEqh8Suye_bxSfeFiFQKb1_ASmQeM_DIrTjEh6QR4rq2CRcZQrLUcT3lClntn0NQPUkQ8Pn7z-ZXTPpJVOf_jpwxBSmqpJPqTCA1urXGGq-i_clnDmhPcjYp5sKIr6Qo-s_cKadH2yIdSzZz6si1BqrwKw_Ixn7BVwqef6blIGI_s7TCzNnDD6fMnH2_WRQBeNGmYCqUbDgiYboKPTB32GcVwbdMTD277nSvMrI5JG9pix3Vy2CWJBtJSVXSLEQZlawcv6Tz8qu8t5ktOGJQ-YCoi3C8C29IkGokQBkD9hCrtJUBMsYCbjsso2lO9DlnR1L-jc3r2h6I0tl4L32Pm3QfgL4zQJSKtTLObJ5BVkEq95dendp4l-jGM%3D)
**The bottom line:**_“Holcomb talked about the state of the Hoosier economy, a $500 million effort to transform regional economies and a daunting challenge in an extended interview on this weekend’s edition of Inside Indiana Business with Gerry Dick...The second-term governor says he is very bullish on the state’s long-term prospects. “The sky’s really the limit for where we end up in 10 or 20 years and that’s what we’re planning for.”_ –– Inside Indiana Business

[**[READ] New state budget invests in Hoosiers' future**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=998048b76f8d4d4184cee8911c18c919&_e=C7MwNB6XFbMc6F-90hPpZyuQw7oPfFWxRDtViB_vqxWyEMSnbGPkPGdwVXS0fUu1ACpiS8WB2aAETPjnEQzmqRuemTD9iUfFM3GoRMF2dyvppgHq7CavM9TvxB3lXmIDwAqe7FKDaa6BORq8b4ctCe0LfU5GeTOHM6XgsfvxpLxmvHJkdPHdYGsCWR_UZLXlFf_6GyCMXJyGPFW5AVhSXCVjVC-OFVsvQXzmBxlL8Iwvx2jDUN_j8CjfRRLOobElSk7cRvylvAHFubFjJvZ1Q_GOF90O1UhIAeQQDJTlQeYj3YCrbm_igC2T9AVP6O5VmD_tVsHFF6VEXTZKOC1Z7MzmVL8WrNjCSJLjzpS1tPfeZ3f2n-KVtdwLiGbx7c0tU70aFdFUgfchaVbqhhSWQZ77EnyaLQRgXoPT9S95eiBntIV0Od_7z7Ld9jjVRWUe02RzW5yHXvsbO3VBXzxbiXTup6EeJRMkcef8Q73XuImhvE1HLZM5e-J7MZiAcswrzV4oEWvo63wZlOemBxu42BlCf-aBrpkGRFA6YoG5_Lppsl-i1gJDauy8LvB5JpIBvZQ31-wqj3RdEG-5zRCE8LgEaMVoHc1y5OVu7mVFAn0%3D)

**The bottom line:**_“The state's updated fiscal forecast in April projected an increase of $2.4 billion in tax revenue over the next three years compared to December's projections. This report reflects confidence in Indiana's future and proof that years of responsible fiscal stewardship played a key role in Indiana's strong emergence out of the pandemic. That's why our new biennial budget pays down debt and makes strategic investments in our citizens, schools, communities and infrastructure.”_ –– State Rep. Bob Heaton (R-46)

[**[READ] Indiana budget, with new revenue, will pay down pension and bond debts**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=998048b76f8d4d4184cee8911c18c919&_e=C7MwNB6XFbMc6F-90hPpZ04MxggldQSW6IAV81JT6uHK4GG8WR5oXkyndCiRtQLmEqL3x9j7TVuS2IuRQAEX8xhCjIaAXLrv77Ewl7hQlUtVZQEOKElSfPCOzseKDBBCUtneXEjc43tungmN1rpK69Tyq94nN_-WI7wS_eCmfWoSBHIgljsoLEwDnAom7V5pI3EAEVRLTkEjB1gTClqvNFpEqmRznHFxNlJddg_dfPhieeD5tBXVhwg4aQvpFqtkzkSU7428OO3Y52CdEzX4FNuuypiq3QhupOkosVbPsuVgjbTbsf6xiMTKkAlEQUMFI7sRPvVloFrlNR2RbOVbkXHPRbfCFtisQcFz4508YhiEnjrA7SFbhzpuLFPh5paUVac0wkIoSbjDINcFSZ-MJjqJJ6lKwDBbZsZBM6QQd7TMvLrlLfezdnIV30Su6wV7lKWe-kEw14THaZ7oX-2UYxixtbc09-cjaki90qBPjuVSGhbujVrndaRm_m2okxYI6pnLwKzF05cYyolBB5t7h3JvS-QYqoubB1WWVPMaDTk%3D)

**The bottom line:**_“A rosier revenue forecast and new federal relief will help Indiana fund infrastructure projects, pay down some debt, replenish reserves and boost education funding...The state will use $300 million to pay down debt. Another $600 million will help the state pay down teacher pension obligation saving money in the long run and $500 million will help shore up the depleted unemployment insurance trust fund.”_ –– The Bond Buyer

Under Governor Holcomb’s leadership, Hoosiers haven’t just weathered the economic turmoil of COVID-19. We’ve emerged **stronger than ever before** , and the future is only getting brighter under this budget.

Thank you for your reading, friend, –– be sure to keep an eye on your inbox for more updates in the coming days!

\- Jake Oakman
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=998048b76f8d4d4184cee8911c18c919&_e=C7MwNB6XFbMc6F-90hPpZx7wWwwzWB6cFPdV7QQoc1EwtLxBWL45P1CsKyJu0DbXekj8uIkB4FHCaON1e0k8_DcQydZOh3Z6f6s_bdqqtG7hrO0Syzfet-5fnM_gbfunHr7E6Xf34SNpM43he_v1bwoKAUbmFYlihCawsqiGgHmGmk6b4niuNdbPCqAj10MP8SiBo1G7R_KayGwKnhNGvl26rixHhwO_IJnsxao4Oudl_WDa2fLPweRtzMEVshiyb7QRD4FLkL5XaFc1A9QUJyRqYY5__l1YMA_I39YMlQ1EhVZNxlAFVqCUhm69rVW1p7tKMj1BXdvqOD2MOWP_ZPCWI42WyjSvkFyziLP5KkgXgwlyHO6KYO7afgx8l4h3P7u8eAL-GyYt0nP18_gxao6r7TMzbRypaXZIX_ial-4QwRwwbH_SvXQJT3J8rytdcu_12pJX6hCDDspFp95xZ8S0tWJDm5s7teVPRBh8m8M%3D) | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=998048b76f8d4d4184cee8911c18c919&_e=C7MwNB6XFbMc6F-90hPpZ1Bxc27h8zy1E4meLj36jhuBWfc2Q7BphqyauRkPhTUKBFP_7UaRQCiL2VDKvvfSPUDr3hhDZtfxaS98i6_DmFmZjCCC_7Lwom3ss_o9jRdSqlvqXnQwUBjTZiX3jittg1RRZLroUHONNBg4fJfS-bU5tkz7e7DJRcmwsJZk9oLRDKUBaR3FLufbFOAzzGOVFtrHIa1tOGJOpsGXt0TaxHSVfISXvQTM3oDy84H6_8nyx4qj3KHqSoE-AlfWowoDxZTlehjdPFxw-tclhIBNvNEsCbekG7537s0w1X4djxKqOPqmqDE3oLAgmwT_rvgznb3C70M8Y_tz_g2ZqPLfyM7Vo4EPObhwVAnrCxNcqzyoxbV0NzdyPsDd338Rl-cAFpn5-Z_8hOE5vM-Fnrro-n385NcG9zqUPAY6vIkUHq-CIMJh-yhVjOgtN61gCNrWMA%3D%3D)

Thank you for your reading, friend, –– be sure to keep an eye on your inbox for more updates in the coming days! \- Jake Oakman | | ---|--- | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2021. All rights reserved. | | Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

body:
While others are busy attacking Alexandria, playing political games, and spreading disinformation, we’re rising above the noise.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210515-2082-header&t=1&akid=2082%2E2526796%2EwMiJv3)
We’ll be straightforward with you: **Our fundraising numbers are not where we need to be in order to hit our mid-month goal by midnight tonight — but we’re close. Take a look:**

While others are busy attacking Alexandria, playing political games, and spreading disinformation, we’re rising above the noise. Alexandria is going to continue speaking truth to power, staying focused on the challenges ahead, and getting relief to working people.
But she can’t do this work alone. She needs a strong grassroots movement alongside her. And when our campaign receives enough support from small-dollar donors to hit each and every fundraising goal, we can carry out our full strategy to expand our movement and enact progressive change in the years to come.
[We still have a gap in fundraising to fill before tonight’s mid-month deadline. However, we can still get back on track if we receive a huge boost of support right now. Will you help get us there by making one of the 488 contributions we’re relying on before midnight?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20210515-1?refcode=em20210515-2082-P&t=22&refcode2=2082_2526796_wMiJv3&akid=2082%2E2526796%2EwMiJv3)

Team AOC

We just sent out our first shift of canvassers for the day so I wanted to check in real fast. We know that the weekends are the best time to connect with voters. Well, we have only 4 more weekends standing between us and the primary. That’s just 4 more Saturdays to hit those doors, make those calls, and send those texts.

That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Whether you are in Virginia or not, there are ways to help power Jennifer’s campaign for the next 3 weeks.

* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. subject: time has flown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
It’s hard to believe this, folks. We’re about a few hours away from our fundraising mid-month deadline, and time has flown since Mike first announced he’s considering running against Dan Patrick. Now more than ever, we need leadership that is willing to step up and solve our state's biggest problems like fixing the grid and preparing for the next storm. But right now, Dan Patrick is not only standing in the way of making that progress, but he is actively creating more problems. Now that the legislative session is about to end, we need to show that Mike Collier has what it takes to defeat Dan Patrick, and that we have the people power behind our movement to do it. That means hitting every fundraising goal from here on out. **We’re running out of time to close the gap. We’re about a few hours away from our fundraising mid-month deadline, and time has flown since Mike first announced he’s considering running against Dan Patrick. Now more than ever, we need leadership that is willing to step up and solve our state's biggest problems like fixing the grid and preparing for the next storm. But right now, Dan Patrick is not only standing in the way of making that progress, but he is actively creating more problems. Now that the legislative session is about to end, we need to show that Mike Collier has what it takes to defeat Dan Patrick, and that we have the people power behind our movement to do it. That means hitting every fundraising goal from here on out. We’re running out of time to close the gap. Can you pitch in any amount today to help us hit our mid-quarter fundraising goal at midnight? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Together, we can build a state government that represents the people of Texas — not corporate PACS and the wealthy few. Thanks for stickin’ by us, Collier for Texas The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

name: Giffords.org
subject: While the NRA is filing dishonest bankruptcy claims, they’re also spending millions of dollars to prevent gun safety measures.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends - The NRA is in deep trouble.
A federal bankruptcy judge just dismissed the NRA’s effort to declare bankruptcy on Tuesday—ruling that the NRA had not filed for bankruptcy in good faith.
According to NPR, The NRA filed bankruptcy to “evade New York officials seeking to dissolve the organization.” And in the words of New York Attorney General Letitia James, the state of New York “sued the NRA to put an end to its fraud and abuse.”
While the NRA is filing bankruptcy claims, they’re also spending millions of dollars trying to make sure we don’t pass universal background checks in the Senate.
If anything, the NRA’s deceit in filing bankruptcy proves that the NRA is not an honest organization. They hold their own interests above the lives of Americans.
[**So we need your help, friend. Can you make a $3 donation to Giffords PAC? We’ll put your contribution to work right away in our efforts to fight the NRA and urge the Senate to pass universal background checks.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/2001?refcode=em210515-1-15&amount=3&t=1&akid=110%2E3935704%2EFShGdi)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/2015?refcode=em210515-1-15&t=14&akid=110%2E3935704%2EFShGdi) | [Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/2003?refcode=em210515-1-15&t=15&akid=110%2E3935704%2EFShGdi)
---|---
[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/2004?refcode=em210515-1-15&t=16&akid=110%2E3935704%2EFShGdi) | [Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/2005?refcode=em210515-1-15&t=17&akid=110%2E3935704%2EFShGdi)
---|---
[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/2006?refcode=em210515-1-15&t=18&akid=110%2E3935704%2EFShGdi) | [Other amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/1999?refcode=em210515-1-15&t=19&akid=110%2E3935704%2EFShGdi)
---|---
Look, the NRA is not trustworthy.
Not only are they trying to evade legal consequences for their financial schemes, but they’re using fear tactics and false advertising to confuse Americans and try to stop decades of progress on gun safety. Their priority is money, and our priority is saving lives.
So, while the NRA spreads lies and files bankruptcy to evade the consequences of its own malfeasance, we’re doing the work to make our communities safer.
Together, we will pass universal background checks and eliminate the NRA’s influence over Congress, while doing honest work and listening to Americans.
Thank you so much for all you do,
Team Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/2001?refcode=em210515-1-15&t=20&akid=110%2E3935704%2EFShGdi)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=21&akid=110%2E3935704%2EFShGdi) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.
