name: NYTimes Alert
subject: Glenn Youngkin has been pushing Trump’s big lie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Terry for Virginia
body:
He wants to take away our freedom to vote.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29227962/285726705/-2023814932?refcode=20210515_NYT_5AM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGE3YWE2Yy1iMmI1LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OH7W6kECi5NbbnQc2HWfgDmShRUMDz3YlCSyw_-37_8=)

| | Add your name and help
Terry stand up for our
right to vote. | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29227963/285726706/-642111259?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGE3YWE2Yy1iMmI1LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OH7W6kECi5NbbnQc2HWfgDmShRUMDz3YlCSyw_-37_8=&emci=69f864c9-f3b4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=68a7aa6c-b2b5-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=7540477)
---
Derek,

Look, I don’t blame you if you didn’t follow the Virginia Republican primary. In the end, it was just an embarrassing debacle to see who could suck up the most to Donald Trump.

**With Trump’s endorsement this week, clearly the biggest suck-up was Glenn Youngkin.**

Like Trump, Youngkin is loaded and he used his bottomless bank account to buy himself the Republican nomination.

**But that’s not where the similarities end, Derek.**

According to the _New York Times,_ Youngkin spent the primary pushing Trump’s big lie about a stolen election. He even called addressing Dominion voting machines the most important issue of the campaign.

Look, Terry says it all the time. This isn’t about “voter integrity,” or stopping some Q-ANON conspiracy theory --

**Republicans like Donald Trump and Glenn Youngkin want to stop Black and Brown people from voting.**

**It’s a return to an era of repugnant Jim Crow laws that have no place in our Commonwealth.**

**[Terry won’t stand for it, and he’s asking for your help. Will you sign our petition and Tell Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump that our democracy is strongest when everyone can vote?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29227964/285726707/-642111259?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGE3YWE2Yy1iMmI1LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OH7W6kECi5NbbnQc2HWfgDmShRUMDz3YlCSyw_-37_8=&emci=69f864c9-f3b4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=68a7aa6c-b2b5-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=7540477)**
[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29227965/285726708/-642111259?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGE3YWE2Yy1iMmI1LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OH7W6kECi5NbbnQc2HWfgDmShRUMDz3YlCSyw_-37_8=&emci=69f864c9-f3b4-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=68a7aa6c-b2b5-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=7540477)
---
As Governor, Terry restored voting rights to 173,000 Virginians -- the most of any governor in history. We can’t let Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump erase all his hard work.

Please, let Terry know you’re on his side.

\-- Team Terry

| Greater Georgia is hitting the ground running, [launching](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Pe1_OIOI9Rw_Fu6-kxYYsYYbARkIbTX3Ad4DrTeaDwlVhnd_2urJ2sgM4h1z3mhstIO7LcVV77SeTzNZSgysO_t5bFXL06c9OZcCfx8Aw4N6yy-LsGcd4JKQgMYLRr5Ska-aJmjhI98KDr8Yzkg3clfO-C8VjlumiMs2C-e8UqwMUiobA9LS8yyUN8ghmHr7_pewf0MzSwpVlljM1TVRzG4sXrApr6xm2ts7LoWyfEe2yJv8SzSd2CE5Sa_kmWpFdD6bsvpFU1u8NCM7GPIXeaRMLChjIFlkWbovpg0RSqTTh9laWlr9DA==&c=miBM4gs038wAywmzAGvJ-dRG8Q70Ro5QX5Ic3XIABwu7YzDLw57B2Q==&ch=NQ--ACSVxoVdrZqeMRkKYvFcwnAOGIuSyoEGP4pPIEB6TqluhONlLQ==&jrc=1) a voter registration and mobilization effort in Marietta ahead of the State House District 34 special election on Tuesday, June 15. Greater Georgia is working to deploy a team of staff, volunteers, and organizers to register conservative-leaning voters ahead of the deadline and to get out the vote via door-to-door canvassing, phone-banking, texting, and handwritten mail.
KEY DATES:
* Voter registration deadline: Monday, May 17
* Advance, in-person early voting begins: Monday, May 24
* Election Day: Tuesday, June 15

To register to vote, visit [www.greatergeorgia.com/register](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Pe1_OIOI9Rw_Fu6-kxYYsYYbARkIbTX3Ad4DrTeaDwlVhnd_2urJ2uPAieUeE8biwJ-uCfs3gVf8FM8U0smhFDa36S8KutZSuNo9XBBCop8muAgAFjnycQacRk3FB9Ppp2H85-bX_hHuyWuuXdhN_wmkPVLkxzUJ&c=miBM4gs038wAywmzAGvJ-dRG8Q70Ro5QX5Ic3XIABwu7YzDLw57B2Q==&ch=NQ--ACSVxoVdrZqeMRkKYvFcwnAOGIuSyoEGP4pPIEB6TqluhONlLQ==&jrc=1).

"... Start with April's [disastrous](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Pe1_OIOI9Rw_Fu6-kxYYsYYbARkIbTX3Ad4DrTeaDwlVhnd_2urJ2sgM4h1z3mhsGTlE6YYoXZW-y-Q6Hqodtj_OEA_Y11ZZCkbzNWFNttbKUfWuFvJKeKR7EElWam7Y8R8-r12QyHObLQKcVDxZ89VqzjVx93IEUVuTZ_oesdHRCM-5kNLMVvge7CMwZEtnU-ulB4nQmtiMRdBZ32GQ6z5y2OVjzL4V&c=miBM4gs038wAywmzAGvJ-dRG8Q70Ro5QX5Ic3XIABwu7YzDLw57B2Q==&ch=NQ--ACSVxoVdrZqeMRkKYvFcwnAOGIuSyoEGP4pPIEB6TqluhONlLQ==&jrc=1) jobs report that missed expectations by an unprecedented 750,000 jobs. At the same time, help-wanted signs abound with a record-setting 8.1 million job openings, alongside rising average wages. Federal benefits now incentivize extended unemployment, with millions of small businesses unable to hire sufficiently to fully reopen. On average, weekly unemployment benefits are nearly $650, roughly equals about $15 per hour for a 40-hour work week. So it's not surprising to see why small businesses are struggling to compete with the government for their employees ...
"One of President Biden's first acts was to sign an executive order cancelling the Keystone Pipeline, destroying thousands of jobs and preventing the creation and preservation of many more ...
"As if that's not enough damage for the first hundred days, Biden's record-setting spending bills are adding to our national debt, putting more of America's future in the hands of foreign debtors. While the $1.9 trillion 'American Rescue Plan' held some needed relief, the vast majority was crammed with partisan [boondoggles](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Pe1_OIOI9Rw_Fu6-kxYYsYYbARkIbTX3Ad4DrTeaDwlVhnd_2urJ2sgM4h1z3mhsnO7havk1wEDb29hrxv-oCBa_qV8h7ZHku-Qa7FIteCGe1WSoFqNpzFe0lu6ec_5mGU4FksLD4oe1NDkvj6VgWL3c7dS30tMZU5XNdgPmOg8iSPwuu_8d3rooRLXdTSPn2MKlomF6dUAifuIWT0wGQZgkHzZ6NqFIZSi3m24Iq0g=&c=miBM4gs038wAywmzAGvJ-dRG8Q70Ro5QX5Ic3XIABwu7YzDLw57B2Q==&ch=NQ--ACSVxoVdrZqeMRkKYvFcwnAOGIuSyoEGP4pPIEB6TqluhONlLQ==&jrc=1), [including](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Pe1_OIOI9Rw_Fu6-kxYYsYYbARkIbTX3Ad4DrTeaDwlVhnd_2urJ2sgM4h1z3mhsrPh3lVNLD1N2AwoiSEtPh9uqha8K3YuFORABNhNDHAn-6uspzH3MBjvsvkjAxwkr4-D3j5jbgNi57s0ZWR243MwDTHVHsg9K4EfF-6Xx3nppY77mIFX909hmhJ8DFbX1PxurR1UVcjfySGEk6Lu0hD76n7MJYpoDw2WJbliu8jc=&c=miBM4gs038wAywmzAGvJ-dRG8Q70Ro5QX5Ic3XIABwu7YzDLw57B2Q==&ch=NQ--ACSVxoVdrZqeMRkKYvFcwnAOGIuSyoEGP4pPIEB6TqluhONlLQ==&jrc=1) millions to expand Obamacare and billions to pay off teachers' unions who kept kids out of school, and to states who kept their residents locked down. Just 10 percent of that bill was [designated](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Pe1_OIOI9Rw_Fu6-kxYYsYYbARkIbTX3Ad4DrTeaDwlVhnd_2urJ2sgM4h1z3mhsHZWTKGAw3tmySlrxH8q81fU5uC5W_KOoLAdoNgOF-kg5EvATyn2P1ZbF_-mB1zLgpm-LcDUK1hY0NLFAAwLv8LcFWOyy3ysItAg3mhQxCW2qE3P5_9Xbu32waHSb98QMzWNSHQWa2iLRK3nUgCaTgNtCfLvRZOyoYk7oBQztaRPug2GQtp4HN2CGfohUSecsRcjzf3bhVCg=&c=miBM4gs038wAywmzAGvJ-dRG8Q70Ro5QX5Ic3XIABwu7YzDLw57B2Q==&ch=NQ--ACSVxoVdrZqeMRkKYvFcwnAOGIuSyoEGP4pPIEB6TqluhONlLQ==&jrc=1) for coronavirus relief, despite the nearly $1 trillion that remained unspent in Congress's 2020 relief bills ...
"From massive, wasteful spending to disastrous energy policy, and job-crushing taxpayer funded subsidies, the Biden administration is attempting to reorient our economy toward Big Government before the pandemic ends. To put us on a stronger path toward recovery, the exact opposite approach is needed. clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Greater Georgia is hitting the ground running, a voter registration and mobilization effort in Marietta ahead of the State House District 34 special election on Tuesday, June 15. Greater Georgia is working to deploy a team of staff, volunteers, and organizers to register conservative-leaning voters ahead of the deadline and to get out the vote via door-to-door canvassing, phone-banking, texting, and handwritten mail. KEY DATES: Voter registration deadline: Monday, May 17 Advance, in-person early voting begins: Monday, May 24 * Election Day: Tuesday, June 15 To register to vote, visit . To sign up to volunteer and get involved in Greater Georgia's effort ahead of this election, visit . To learn more about the special election for State House District 34, click . | | | | | | | | UPDATES: | GREATER GEORGIA HOSTS VOLUNTEER TRAINING SESSION Greater Georgia's field team hosted a volunteer training session in Cobb County and discussed how can help register more voters, engage more communities, and stand up for election integrity in Georgia. May 3, 2021 | | | | | | | | LOEFFLER MEETS WITH GRASSROOTS CONSERVATIVES Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler met with several groups over the past two weeks to discuss Greater Georgia's mission and to listen to ideas for advancing conservative principles. May 13-15, 2021 7th Congressional District GOP Convention (May 15) | | | | | Hispanic Community Leaders, Golden Drops Cafe, Decatur (May 14) | | | | Georgia Log Cabin Republicans (May 13) | | | | | | | | | | IN THE NEWS: | Kelly joined Martha Zoller on her WDUN morning show to discuss Greater Georgia's mission and its recent push to hold Secretary Raffensperger accountable for the rapid, inconsistent elections process changes he made potentially benefitting his own interests. May 3, 2021 "... We've seen sweeping, unprecedented changes ... there was also a consent decree signed unbeknownst to the General Assembly. It came out last month that Secretary Raffensperger took $5.5 million from Big Tech, on top of the money that went to the counties. He conducted a mass-mailing of unsolicited absentee ballot request forms, and the list goes on, culminating in orchestrating the recording and release of a call with President Trump just two days before David Perdue and my Senate runoff ... Georgians just want to know [the process] is fair ... No one's above the law, even our top elections official ..." Click to listen to the full interview. | | | | | Kelly joins a lighthearted discussion on Chris and Andrew Cuomo, Jen Psaki, what it's like to be a Republican woman, "racist" sidewalks, and Facebook's free-speech hypocrisy. May 6, 2021 Click or the video below to watch the highlights. | | | | | "Biden's Inflated Policies Are Already Flashing Red" Loeffler Pens Op-Ed Slamming Joe Biden's Failed Economic Policies May 14, 2021 - "... Start with April's jobs report that missed expectations by an unprecedented 750,000 jobs. At the same time, help-wanted signs abound with a record-setting 8.1 million job openings, alongside rising average wages. Federal benefits now incentivize extended unemployment, with millions of small businesses unable to hire sufficiently to fully reopen. On average, weekly unemployment benefits are nearly $650, roughly equals about $15 per hour for a 40-hour work week. So it's not surprising to see why small businesses are struggling to compete with the government for their employees ... "One of President Biden's first acts was to sign an executive order cancelling the Keystone Pipeline, destroying thousands of jobs and preventing the creation and preservation of many more ... "As if that's not enough damage for the first hundred days, Biden's record-setting spending bills are adding to our national debt, putting more of America's future in the hands of foreign debtors. While the $1.9 trillion 'American Rescue Plan' held some needed relief, the vast majority was crammed with partisan , millions to expand Obamacare and billions to pay off teachers' unions who kept kids out of school, and to states who kept their residents locked down. Just 10 percent of that bill was for coronavirus relief, despite the nearly $1 trillion that remained unspent in Congress's 2020 relief bills ... "From massive, wasteful spending to disastrous energy policy, and job-crushing taxpayer funded subsidies, the Biden administration is attempting to reorient our economy toward Big Government before the pandemic ends. To put us on a stronger path toward recovery, the exact opposite approach is needed. We should scale back the enhanced unemployment benefits to incentivize work; shift our supply chains out of China and back to the United States; prioritize training for displaced workers; support our energy independence, return kids to school and provide more opportunities to empower working families ..." Click to read the full op-ed. | | | | Excerpt from "The Jolt" (AJC): Greater Georgia's House District 34 Efforts May 7, 2021 - "... The voter mobilization group Greater Georgia, founded by former U.S. Sen. Kelly Loeffler, launched a registration drive this week and outlined plans to deploy staff, volunteers and organizers to register conservative-leaning voters [leading up to the State House District 34 special election]. 'At such a pivotal time for our state, Greater Georgia is laser-focused on sending elected officials to the General Assembly who will champion the pro-growth, conservative values that uplift all communities,' said Loeffler." body:
This week's updates from Joe Kent (Candidate for WA-03) | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
####
# **Joe Kent
Highlights 9-15 May 2021**
---
| **This Week's Events:
10 May 2021, Skamania Town Hall - [Intro](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=9fe78096e8&e=00856e661d), [Manufacturing](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=c4beb73157&e=00856e661d), [American Working Class](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=ad076cc665&e=00856e661d)
11 May 2021, Cowlitz County Community Action Night - [Election Integrity](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=f859173a1b&e=00856e661d), [Education](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=23a9c7ed60&e=00856e661d), [President Trump](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=7730b678f3&e=00856e661d)
14-16 May 2021, Falcon Gun Show Meet and Greet & Volunteer Sign Up, [pictures](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=1562e94232&e=00856e661d)
15-16 May 2021, Wes Knodel Gun Show Meet and Greet & Volunteer Sign Up

Upcoming Events:
Monday, 17 May - Discord & Reddit online "Ask Me Anything" - **Join Joe Kent for an AMA on the Save America (Est. 2017) server on the Discord App Monday, May 17th at 9pm Eastern, 6pm Pacific. To join, use this invite link and message a server mod after you join: [Save America (Est. 2017) (discord.com)](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=1ef609b842&e=00856e661d)
**Friday, 21 May \- [Clark County Republican Women's Event](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=8acd625fe2&e=00856e661d)
Thursday, 3 Jun 6pm-8pm- Lewis County Meet & Greet, **Pathway Church of God** ** 1416 S Scheuber Rd #9018, Centralia, WA 98531
**Saturday, 26 June, Fundraiser, **Click link for details and tickets **[26 June Event Tickets](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=b437e87f89&e=00856e661d)
Sunday, 27 June, Fundraiser, **Click link for details and tickets** [27 June Event Tickets](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=1f9cb03ce5&e=00856e661d)

Our AWESOME Volunteers in action:
Camas School Board Protest (CRT) - [pic1](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=94517e156c&e=00856e661d) [pic2](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=233ee821eb&e=00856e661d) (See below for Joe's letter to the School Board)
Want to Volunteer? Sign up [here](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=95a9c5d190&e=00856e661d)!

Media
12 May 2021, Twitter Live - [JHB, Cheney](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=c97d6e89cb&e=00856e661d)
13 May 2021, Twitter Live - [Current Events and America First](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=51cd7f188d&e=00856e661d)
13 May 2021, Lars Larson Interview- [CDC Guidance, Big Tech, Colonial Pipeline and Israel](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=319cc9dac2&e=00856e661d)

PRESS RELEASES:

Press Release about Rep Beutler's support of Liz Cheney, 11 May 2021: **Representative Jaime Herrera Beutler once again turned her back on the constituents of Washington’s Third Congressional District. Beutler’s vocal support for retaining Liz Cheney as part of the leadership in the House of Representatives is a slap in the face to all conservatives and constitutionalists.

[Click Here to view PDF of Joe Kent's Statement about Rep Beutler's support of Liz Cheney on 11 May 2021](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=e11aa157ad&e=00856e661d)
* * *

**Press Release - My open letter to Camas School Board, 12 May 2021:** It is disappointing to see the Camas School Board prioritize the teaching of Critical Race Theory. I wrote an open letter to the Camas School Board expressing my disappointment in their teaching of a Marxist Ideology to our children.
[Click Here to view PDF of Joe Kent's Open Letter to the Camas School Board on 12 May 2021](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=08f579f014&e=00856e661d)

* * *

**Press Release - Joining Washington Alliance of Technology Workers Amicus Brief, 13 May 2021:**
This week I’m honored to join the Washington Alliance of Technology Workers case with four patriotic congressmen. The purpose of this case is to end the Post-completion Optional Practical Training loophole that allowed immigrants on student visas to be employed by companies here in the United States after these students have completed their studies. Big business has exploited this program to employ untold numbers of foreigners and take jobs away from American citizens.

[Click Here to view PDF of Joe Kent's Statement about joining the Washington Alliance of Technology workers case released on 13 May 2021](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=0042716321&e=00856e661d)

[Click Here to view a PDF of the Amicus Brief filed 12 May 2021](https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=2d31a94ee0&e=00856e661d)

* * *

name: Mark Kelly
subject: National Republicans just dropped a six-figure ad buy in Arizona. I need your help this weekend to fight back!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Hey friend — it’s me again. I know I reached out yesterday but we just got some news that couldn’t wait until Monday to share.
This week, One Nation, a National Republican Super PAC, dropped a six-figure ad buy in Arizona attacking our campaign. It’s the latest sign that National Republicans are willing to spend whatever it takes to try to win back this seat.
**So today we are launching a 48-hour fundraising drive to help us fight back, and our goal is to raise $100,000 by Sunday at midnight.**
We need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of this attack, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us there.
**You can see how high the stakes are. So here’s the part where I have to ask:**
[**Will you make a $3 donation to our people-powered campaign? We can’t afford to fall short of this emergency goal, not when we are being targeted by National Republicans.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210515-1-15&t=1&refcode2=609_6688874_IWaANW&akid=609%2E6688874%2EIWaANW)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [Donate $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em210515-1-15&t=2&refcode2=609_6688874_IWaANW&akid=609%2E6688874%2EIWaANW) | [Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210515-1-15&t=3&refcode2=609_6688874_IWaANW&akid=609%2E6688874%2EIWaANW)
---|---
[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210515-1-15&t=4&refcode2=609_6688874_IWaANW&akid=609%2E6688874%2EIWaANW) | [Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210515-1-15&t=5&refcode2=609_6688874_IWaANW&akid=609%2E6688874%2EIWaANW)
---|---
[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210515-1-15&t=6&refcode2=609_6688874_IWaANW&akid=609%2E6688874%2EIWaANW) | [Other amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210515-1-15&t=7&refcode2=609_6688874_IWaANW&akid=609%2E6688874%2EIWaANW)
---|---
Our road ahead is only going to get tougher. But I’m confident that with your support we can fight back and hold this Senate seat.
The amount of resources we have is important, because defending this seat is going to be expensive. So any support you can give will be greatly appreciated.
Thank you in advance for chipping in!
My very best,
—Mark
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210515-1-15&t=8&refcode2=609_6688874_IWaANW&akid=609%2E6688874%2EIWaANW)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=9&akid=609%2E6688874%2EIWaANW).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Blaine Luetkemeyer (Do not ignore)
subject: 2 minute update on America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blaine For Congress
body:
I have a very important issue I would like to bring up with you because I know that you will understand what our country is going through right now.
**📬 [NOTICE TO TOP CONSERVATIVES](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nT25BXcLgzdON3jm5JQfEeNW5rQNOvNOygMwUO-4qCi0NDpyBMwy7MzJtqk6DcvHWz_Nfd1av32WdYNC7oCsCjxhoyJ1dYN21p-dFvIHmIdAH29t66nN1qa6ol8y2RaoUwQfCKTI4mMjmnmGgM97ZeGxswOuL4ICEK8lCr1ZI_LrpGd_W2YKkiV6klodeP-f8Fh3QHsSCtQ-dhDy_De6NI8Go-gSYghhW1tEZJZZO5uQ_IbHgLfvjoptUHFkAgRGJ_dS9CPVMmPHXKWd3zS-CHzJZdmC4pRFlG-Ytx9LmgOvHy_7F83s9OD8aVAe9snEqAJcNpdYkMJM3aGXwHUwnKiuHpxseBm7PR9_wtRMMgrxC4OWlCthMtd3-1b4xZqK9lTzz_T7OfeRQWeyMtlsXWYJB3feEHjdb4ssWdZAI9dU7oaEk-9PgDm4H5VPqlPH2NRVIcBqpq_3i7U1YRrit9GuHUBAC5YZ&c=hZCGRESJC2rFyBXHrRuGfDccBnCN4foP2XXg7qnEFDpx3rZxOLb89g==&ch=Jc1fICO5Yk0putbLaAko9YB10yzqhWiSRZc6Af-YRcHIlB_juuZHwQ==) 📬**

_****Do Not Ignore****_

Friend, it's Congressman Luetkemeyer. I have a very important issue I would like to bring up with you because I know that you will understand what our country is going through right now.

I want to share with you what exactly this agenda the Democrats are proposing means for us.

When President Biden gave his State of the Union address a few weeks back, he made it painfully clear that **his vision for America is different than a majority of Americans.**

Arkansas law limits contributions to $5,600 per election cycle. Each individual, political party committee, legislative caucus committee or approved political action committee may contribute up to $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election -- for a total of $5,600.
Corporate contributions are not permissible.
Contributions are not tax deductible for Federal income tax purposes. Individuals may take a tax credit on Arkansas tax returns, up to a total of $50 per individual for political contributions made each year.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited by law.

name: Team Dumas
subject: Final stretch -- We need your help!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court
body:
[https://secure.anedot.com/friends-to-elect-judge-dumas-for-commonwealth-court/donate]
Dear Friends,
This morning brought great opportunity to spread the good news as we count down the final 3 days of the campaign: Lori has been traveling the State from East to West, North to South and these are some of thing people are saying :
" Lori brings a better set of judicial skills and more balanced experience, we believe, than any of the other candidates, and Lori leap-frogs ahead when it comes to diverse expertise, style and real performance as a real Judge, exhibiting a proven passion that ... will require energy, rigor, temperament, pragmatism and integrity. ”
While others claim their qualifications, Lori has a proven track record of 19 years doing the job, managing the caseloads in civil, criminal and family courts while being a community leader, while on the right side of the bench. There is no question that judicial mastery trumps qualifications every time.
We’re $30,000 away from our final fundraising push— and we need your help to meet our goal by Monday and keep the momentum on our side. [https://secure.anedot.com/friends-to-elect-judge-dumas-for-commonwealth-court/donate] Can you help with $25, $50, $100, or whatever you're able, to support our campaign and help Judge Dumas win on the 18th! [https://secure.anedot.com/friends-to-elect-judge-dumas-for-commonwealth-court/donate]
Contribute your own amount [https://secure.anedot.com/friends-to-elect-judge-dumas-for-commonwealth-court/donate] $25 [https://secure.anedot.com/friends-to-elect-judge-dumas-for-commonwealth-court/donate?amount=25] $50 [https://secure.anedot.com/friends-to-elect-judge-dumas-for-commonwealth-court/donate?amount=50] $100 [https://secure.anedot.com/friends-to-elect-judge-dumas-for-commonwealth-court/donate?amount=100] $250 [https://secure.anedot.com/friends-to-elect-judge-dumas-for-commonwealth-court/donate?amount=250]When employers recruit top talent in their organizations, they look at 3 things: experience, proven skills, and fit, why should the voters of Pennsylvania accept anything less? Judge Lori Dumas has the proven experience, not just judicial skills but judicial mastery, and she is the perfect fit to bring a different perspective from people of different backgrounds.
Great athletes like Allen Iverson stood for “Getting it Done,” meaning: it’s not about talking about the game, it’s about being in the game. Lori has been in the game and getting it done for almost 2 decades. Pennsylvania needs real leadership and experience from a Judge who knows how to “Get it Done”.
That’s Lori A. Dumas.
Thank you so much for your tremendous support,
Michael Laws, Campaign Manager
PS. If you haven't yet seen Judge Dumas's video, please watch it here and share with everyone you know! https://youtu.be/p-HXiHkTaLk [https://youtu.be/p-HXiHkTaLk]
Remember to Vote on Tuesday, May 18th
(Find your polling location at https://atlas.phila.gov/voting [https://atlas.phila.gov/voting] )
https://www.facebook.com/JudgeDumas [https://www.facebook.com/JudgeDumas] https://twitter.com/JudgeDumas [https://twitter.com/JudgeDumas] https://www.instagram.com/friendsofjudgedumas/ [https://www.instagram.com/friendsofjudgedumas/]
Judge Dumas is an experienced judge with the compassion and integrity to properly preside over the citizens of our great Commonwealth. To learn more about Judge Dumas's vast history in the courts and her platform, click here [https://www.judgedumas2021.com/judge-lori-dumas] .
Donate Today [https://secure.anedot.com/friends-to-elect-judge-dumas-for-commonwealth-court/donate]Paid for by Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court
Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court
PO Box 40606
Phialdelpha, PA 19107
United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dan=20Crenshaw?=
subject: Crisis
body:
| |
---
| | | [ ](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=f16f277cda&e=56fbdb3cc4)
---
| | | Peter -

**Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi have their backs against the wall. **

They’ve created **crisis after crisis** for the American people, and it’s just going to get worse.

❌Russian hackers have targeted critical energy infrastructure.
❌There are lines wrapping around gas stations.
❌Gas prices are skyrocketing.
❌Consumer goods are becoming unaffordable because of runaway inflation.
❌People aren’t going back to work because Joe and Nancy are paying them to stay home.
---
| [Fight Back](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=c0eece1c17&e=56fbdb3cc4 "Fight Back")
---
| American families are facing serious problems because of Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi’s disastrous policies, and President Biden is nowhere to be found.

When asked what his plan was to respond to the mounting crises facing our country, Biden refused to answer.

“I’m not supposed to be answering all these questions,” Biden said.

**Here are some of the headlines in Joe Biden’s America this week:**

**NBC News:** Biden administration scrambles to stave off gas shortage crisis

**FOX News:** What's Joe Biden's crisis-control plan?

**New York Post:** Govs urge Biden, Harris to get grip on border crisis as 21K migrant kids being held

Now, the radical left tries to distract you by pretending political fights in Washington are the real story instead of the fact that people can’t afford gas and unemployment numbers are rising. The media is helping too by refusing to cover the crises Biden has created.

They want you to be distracted by political infighting in Washington so you don’t pay attention to the real problems right outside your front door. **Don’t take their bait. **

It’s never been more important to take back control from these radicals. We need to take back the House and Senate in 2022. We need to take back the White House in 2024. And the only way we’re going to do that is by staying laser focused on the **real problems** American families are facing at the hands of a socialist government.

I’m not going to let the left and the media distract the American people from what really matters in their lives: **good jobs, a strong economy, a secure border, their kids returning to school, and safe communities. **

I’m ready to get to work to solve these problems, even if our current President isn’t. **And I’m ready to kick Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden out of office by never letting them win another election again. **

[**Will you help me?**](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=2000abda05&e=56fbdb3cc4)
---
| [Contribute Now](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=0e142b6da2&e=56fbdb3cc4 "Contribute Now")
---
| In Service,

Dan Crenshaw
---
| | |
---
|
---
|
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=8d0eb33ba1&e=56fbdb3cc4&c=e6756be544) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://CrenshawforCongress.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=96cdb996364a2e23e221e200b&id=8d0eb33ba1&e=56fbdb3cc4&c=e6756be544).

body:
This is happening everywhere

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001N4XWBDQnA4Lb6-xInVLviEFvWcrvQADdpZ9Ggy4pkeBWGBRfwEyKf4o1Hq0IY57LYBtkrK-KNFVdIdaKhAbHXVhPfApnEbTi3llx0y63RokS7obszLX1Tudc0u4QArz5xhSXq-9G5enTc-vI2W-5_ivChCS8SyVrgXzTa6P5w_hunDHDE3SoNxLORFijDXXPUHp73X5IPGRAoyaGyGstuirpaO1tI6LJGrmSIb-ICd6CzonI6pHZ_GOlFmJGI6Rcm_9ekLOHDhxeZ-yzw3YjUXxAx6inYEqlTARtO0g3G3eIr8D9Ls_fDl8TI_HBb9LWgX4jZXVCNjFuYapyNr9rYAjQckyr-1cIU_PHvHfkZlCAhWfOrEzxmTPTGihtHn_wZabU94iQlEqlQaCB4av6tZsw2uV1f112kP8vl3fDxi3iGoR9gsYf8isqh_mKjb59Gz4XoN4lV8A=&c=eJhBn8sEnGew0urIrpJjeduAaXjykf4zzEqUpguugIjUlQLIHfUYkQ==&ch=gWBVuz_OWTWcj0zXys5RUpXgn-zM4Ok4WyAAT4ExZ3TRz6zr7eEYBQ==)

Friend,
Like you, I'm extremely worried about what we are seeing in this country:
* **A crisis at our Southern border and NO plan to fix it**
* **Gas stations out of fuel with long lines at the pump**
* **Efforts to eliminate our police officers and border control**
* **Conflict overseas and a lack of American leadership**
* **An economy that is struggling to recover because of Washington**

It's exactly why we are running in this MUST WIN Texas Special Election Runoff. The fate of our country is on the line, and I won't sit by and do nothing.
[**That 's why I'm humbly asking for you to help out by chipping in just $5 today to fuel our grassroots campaign and bring some sanity back to Washington. **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001N4XWBDQnA4Lb6-xInVLviEFvWcrvQADdpZ9Ggy4pkeBWGBRfwEyKf4o1Hq0IY57LYBtkrK-KNFVdIdaKhAbHXVhPfApnEbTi3llx0y63RokS7obszLX1Tudc0u4QArz5xhSXq-9G5enTc-vI2W-5_ivChCS8SyVrgXzTa6P5w_hunDHDE3SoNxLORFijDXXPUHp73X5IPGRAoyaGyGstuirpaO1tI6LJGrmSIb-ICd6CzonI6pHZ_GOlFmJGI6Rcm_9ekLOHDhxeZ-yzw3YjUXxAx6inYEqlTARtO0g3G3eIr8D9Ls_fDl8TI_HBb9LWgX4jZXVCNjFuYapyNr9rYAjQckyr-1cIU_PHvHfkZlCAhWfOrEzxmTPTGihtHn_wZabU94iQlEqlQaCB4av6tZsw2uV1f112kP8vl3fDxi3iGoR9gsYf8isqh_mKjb59Gz4XoN4lV8A=&c=eJhBn8sEnGew0urIrpJjeduAaXjykf4zzEqUpguugIjUlQLIHfUYkQ==&ch=gWBVuz_OWTWcj0zXys5RUpXgn-zM4Ok4WyAAT4ExZ3TRz6zr7eEYBQ==)
Look, I don't ask for help unless it's critical -- _**and right now it is.**_
_Our opponents are spending heavily to stop me from winning this race_ -- and I'm not afraid of political attacks, but I do know it's 100% vital that we can respond.

Friend,
I'm glad to reach you – this is URGENT. I’m calling on all conservatives to take a stand.
**Elise Stefanik is a Make America Great Again conservative warrior.**.. I’m proud to count her among my closest allies, and _she’s now to serve as Chair of the House Republican Conference_ , our #3 leadership spot!
Elise has my complete and total endorsement for this position.
Today, I’m writing to ask YOU to stand with Elise too. I’ll explain more on why below.
**[If you support Elise Stefanik, rush a donation NOW.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3e5d08d270054c7d974f2f0de07e68a8&_e=ACyI6xWXMc9wikxe5w_9WcgiX_cSUBvqABowbBGjZExICNyKDvLKDm-eFsKa1-5u7XFIT03ljWBntkjpVKFfDL8r-i8nmh0M16cvqcdiHMjtXE7QRErNjdDKJ4kT8HLH1BQ2eX9A-TCBkQCHClkiVaYjKzPYSxlDvrlEwRDtviVG5BNrSs4uc8SjKGnvTdTn1x8Oi5eb_TWxp0lNJNKqXeHAGkJcs0FyiGtJrMkQw0ZXO8Y5KOrJVoidB9YhYLuoTsrtjXxMXpzFS4AEk-pLTIsyinx_fwPe-kjXISs1JlKa-mkSA2P2LPxh8kxSGF6PuuqFWcDj10StmGJxfwly6tzw2s6PPpeEIji8ds8Fjt5MTe-mzTNJf17tRgRoJ_GA8pAR5Q1g88Hp2BKRnDeUCj_oTwKzVs4ARhOeh43S9gwKxkzOVzKk0yZpAEbYx4ll)** **🚨 JOIN TEAM ELISE! 🚨** [**PITCH IN HERE >>**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3e5d08d270054c7d974f2f0de07e68a8&_e=ACyI6xWXMc9wikxe5w_9WcgiX_cSUBvqABowbBGjZExICNyKDvLKDm-eFsKa1-5u7XFIT03ljWBntkjpVKFfDL8r-i8nmh0M16cvqcdiHMjtXE7QRErNjdDKJ4kT8HLH1BQ2eX9A-TCBkQCHClkiVaYjKzPYSxlDvrlEwRDtviVG5BNrSs4uc8SjKGnvTdTn1x8Oi5eb_TWxp0lNJNKqXeHAGkJcs0FyiGtJrMkQw0Zy_g3IAvvi7E9vg_7W3SLRi6NGVCn567IGibBGI2kJo8dKEaAgz-2SCnskhrsbc0fNiTEAM1dLxcSIjm8SIL8rnx8oVtngKoJzEWe92EbSwoAlXocL2yVkfXIjJ-m14ey4dMTycZWfdjRuy9Jsimrt48jxfCNT2g-vm_OoslEo7zozsC6X1wMovGwbSI2HmfGTntXniEw4fDHmctyAKQVF) When the Democrats launched their fraudulent impeachment campaign smear against President Trump, Elise stood up to FIGHT BACK in the House. The Pelosi machine targeted her relentlessly for it.
When Republican turncoats were abandoning President Trump last fall, she stood strong for what’s RIGHT.
And over the last two years, Elise Stefanik LED the way to our Party’s amazing House scorecard in the 2020 elections... **she stood with Republican women running to flip key seats, and they GOT THE JOB DONE!**
We now have more Republican women in Congress than at ANY other time in history.

body:
#

Friend —
In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a $3 contribution to Malcolm Kenyatta's campaign to fight for Pennsylvania's working families in the U.S. Senate. Please give us a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here's the truth:
We launched a 72-hour fundraising drive to keep our fundraising on pace before tonight's mid-quarter deadline.
**But right now, we're only about 75% of the way to our goal of 1,000 donations, and it looks like we might fall short.**
A lot of our opponents are taking money from corporate PACs (something we _refuse_ to do), and they'll be tough to beat if we don't hit our fundraising goals.
So we're asking you to pitch in. We can't do this alone.

name: Team Jayapal
subject: What we’ve been up to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
And how we’re trying to round out the middle of the quarter.
#
Hey Peter,
Our team is making a big fundraising push right now and we wanted to send you a note highlighting three of Pramila’s massive efforts so far in the second quarter.
* **Pramila’s push to end the filibuster:** The House has passed a long list of critical legislation that is stuck in the Senate if we don’t end the racist, undemocratic filibuster. In order to pass historic voting rights protections, enact gun safety legislation, get big money out of politics, make D.C. a state, protect the environment, pass the Dream Act, and so much more, the filibuster needs to go! That’s why Pramila is helping lead a nationwide push to speak out about ending the filibuster and pressure the Senate to get rid of it.

* **Introducing College for All with Bernie Sanders:** Pramila and Bernie introduced a landmark bill to ensure everyone can attend public college, community college, or trade school without going into debt. The College for All Act will end the debt spiral that too many working families find themselves in by eliminating tuition and fees at public colleges and universities for families making up to $125,000. That's nearly 80 percent of families in America. The bill also makes community college and trade schools _FREE_ for every person across the country.

* **Pramila is leading on expanding Medicare as we fight for Medicare for All:** Pramila has helped lead the push alongside Bernie Sanders to pressure Congress and President Biden to expand, improve, and empower Medicare. The goal is to (1) lower the eligibility age of Medicare to open it up to more than 40 million more people, (2) require Medicare to cover dental, vision, and hearing care, and (3) lower prescription drug prices for everyone. This would be a transformative change to our broken, for-profit health care system on our way to Medicare for All.

**_Those are just three huge things that Pramila is leading on as she fights for people across this country._ [Can you help keep up this fight with a donation of $3 today? It’s critical that we raise $10,000 before Monday in order to strengthen our fundraising pace at the midpoint of the second quarter! Pramila is counting on us to have her back as she delivers for all of us.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2159?refcode=em20210515-290&t=19&akid=290%2E420207%2EW-t0wp)**
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2159?refcode=em20210515-290&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=290%2E420207%2EW-t0wp)**
We have a lot of work to do, and Pramila is so thankful for your support every step of the way.
\- Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210515-290-footer&t=21&refcode2=290_420207_W-t0wp&akid=290%2E420207%2EW-t0wp)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=22&akid=290%2E420207%2EW-t0wp)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=290%2E420207%2EW-t0wp)

That’s right -- according to election guru Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ , the most competitive race in 2021 will be the Virginia Governor’s race.

With Virginia Republicans breaking fundraising records and Donald Trump focusing all his resources on the race, Virginia Democrats have to get to work right now to protect Virginia’s progress.

We can’t let Republicans turn the Commonwealth into a safe haven for Trumpism and right-wing extremism.

name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: Wins of the Week
body:
| | | | We've been busy filing so many lawsuits against Biden.
---
---

Dear Peter,
Over the past few weeks, I have been traveling around the Mountain State discussing our efforts to protect West Virginia from federal overreach and upholding our constitutional freedoms. We spent time in Mineral, Preston, Taylor, Kanawha, Wood, Jackson, Cabell, and Greenbrier counties!
We have been busy filing lawsuits against the Biden Administration and getting ready to defend some of our new state laws which support your 2nd Amendment rights, the right to life, and educational choice.
While some people compromise on core constitutional values, we don’t. Despite getting hit hard by all the liberal special interest groups, and the fake news, we will continue to stand tall for our conservative West Virginia principles.
Please enjoy some recent articles below about our activities and accomplishments. We would be grateful if you would ask others to follow our emails and to help us grow financially to compete against our rich, liberal, special-interest opponents.

clean_body: | | | | We've been busy filing so many lawsuits against Biden. Dear Peter, Over the past few weeks, I have been traveling around the Mountain State discussing our efforts to protect West Virginia from federal overreach and upholding our constitutional freedoms. We spent time in Mineral, Preston, Taylor, Kanawha, Wood, Jackson, Cabell, and Greenbrier counties! We have been busy filing lawsuits against the Biden Administration and getting ready to defend some of our new state laws which support your 2nd Amendment rights, the right to life, and educational choice. While some people compromise on core constitutional values, we don’t. Despite getting hit hard by all the liberal special interest groups, and the fake news, we will continue to stand tall for our conservative West Virginia principles. Please enjoy some recent articles below about our activities and accomplishments. We would be grateful if you would ask others to follow our emails and to help us grow financially to compete against our rich, liberal, special-interest opponents. Thanks again for all of your help as we continue to defend America with all of our energy. Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General | Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Morrisey 2020, Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. With the latest bill she just jammed through, law-abiding Republicans won't stand a chance...Pelosi wants to stack the deck against Republicans by federalizing elections. | [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9bd6469a7ec546309a936b5cfc2b4f4c&_e=Mxq7H4eI9phGOSrRI6zOqyCMbBYbIFIh7tfEYgRRWGVViSWxoDV5ZvamNIOTzLVNUa7-bopeiZCnCdIAsVhyk9IouOdHd1B8I0JMPIAenPRsu1cIKZMtq4eRMtKJYs2pwEZoj7Q0vRnYRRCpMHKYOXBrUpGJFcm5PbGuWaAjmTTInp2hFVclO5d4XkWoIiWtFFwc5iyY_NWsJn6_PZp3_U1XLR7sozvDDHgCMnJ4v0LK835-cS4G6bFsavqWwAjto_2Wa4Bm6NKj3hmlkbAaVE_xLyNNS2EmP2DAmyHVuCwQlCJy497ojTJuHNHGeDA1EqvYTI8AwcJSwKtXlMQpSEsTb53P_OtS9tNHjFYnaNJgJZpDt4A_elxCZlRyZaHI3FqU2zvIr6JdS2Y-UHncoGJUnkVcLeoMmNjqiJI-2v6xTk1N9ViqiG0UwxUcQk1aTl1IKw4w_BwAN7QCiRLjTPWyp-zykilPoGwvXaP-V6f4frBctdDDzOB7_35eVmYV)

Friend,

What a year for the socialist agenda in Congress. First, Nancy Pelosi passed the $1.9 trillion COVID relief package in the House – **in the middle of the night** – without a single Republican vote.

Then, Pelosi and House Democrats pushed through another outrageous piece of legislation – H.R. 1, a massive election reform bill — which if passed by the Senate would enable **Democrats** to cement a **permanent Congressional majority**.

How? By requiring states to adopt national voting standards set forth by Democrats in Congress including,
1. Allowing government agencies to _**ignore immigration status**_ when referring applicants to election boards under “automatic” voter registration, and,
2. Doing away with state voter-ID laws. No ID to verify voter eligibility? No problem!

[**Stand With Me
Protect Voter ID Laws➔**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9bd6469a7ec546309a936b5cfc2b4f4c&_e=Mxq7H4eI9phGOSrRI6zOqyCMbBYbIFIh7tfEYgRRWGVViSWxoDV5ZvamNIOTzLVNUa7-bopeiZCnCdIAsVhyk9IouOdHd1B8I0JMPIAenPRsu1cIKZMtq4eRMtKJYs2pwEZoj7Q0vRnYRRCpMHKYOXBrUpGJFcm5PbGuWaAjmTTInp2hFVclO5d4XkWoIiWtFFwc5iyY_NWsJn6_PZp3_U1XLR7sozvDDHgCMnJ4v0LK835-cS4G6bFsavqWwAjto_2Wa4Bm6NKj3hmlkbAaVE_xLyNNS2EmP2DAmyHVuCySyW7-W5arbKOV-VeTHA_LaR-cJYUjelhSCXtro7CD0N8qK7pq32ORfzxyoQYY3ogadSv9IK0c5UrxS566DKm4TwbZK16ah1n3YGLtOWNgvA5ObyO_RtanVG0xAgobsMNnmTRvLmyvXbP8xXVlaOEyyQirOI-P1p1oFrA0GA00Pm1vyIeG8o_LVHYGqR_Kcp0kn9IqvfrtzGQMiOCML7lZ)
---

While the entire bill is rubbish, there are several provisions that worry me more than others. Should Senate Democrats pass H.R. 1:
1. Members of Congress would be entitled to taxpayer money to fund their campaigns – up to $5 MILLION dollars.
2. Congress will be committed to delivering “full congressional voting rights to the District of Columbia (Washington, D.C.) – bypassing a vote on D.C. statehood which cannot pass in a bill of its own.

**We can put an end to these thinly-veiled attempts at fundamentally altering the way our elections are run – but to do so we need to elect a Republican majority**.
[**Stand With Me
Protect Voter ID Laws➔**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9bd6469a7ec546309a936b5cfc2b4f4c&_e=Mxq7H4eI9phGOSrRI6zOqyCMbBYbIFIh7tfEYgRRWGVViSWxoDV5ZvamNIOTzLVNUa7-bopeiZCnCdIAsVhyk9IouOdHd1B8I0JMPIAenPRsu1cIKZMtq4eRMtKJYs2pwEZoj7Q0vRnYRRCpMHKYOXBrUpGJFcm5PbGuWaAjmTTInp2hFVclO5d4XkWoIiWtFFwc5iyY_NWsJn6_PZp3_U1XLR7sozvDDHgCMnJ4v0LK835-cS4G6bFsavqWwAjto_2Wa4Bm6NKj3hmlkbAaVE_xLyNNS2EmP2DAmyHVuCyW_7R9nqwHl2wLz2zh7RDnRsfkSAqy5B7WRLScdB9sagOoqOhMPia6RPWsh4VmmjFGm0CYnMHwvbIOstRwqnDUrgoU4pEiR2spepQgTYAzkjp5YRrb6jqW64xMn4SI1eEb6APJD4PLQFY4AreIA8CwQixW2KIhxePrt6TjRDy_zW1WPly0b9H_K4XFeGuuFVCPOZDf_NzmOzcshh3kz3vJ)
---

I have to be honest with you, Friend, while the COVID-relief package was chock full of wasteful spending that increased the budget deficit exponentially, H.R. 1 would fundamentally alter American elections _forever_.

It’s our duty to raise awareness about Pelosi’s blatant attempt to amass a permanent Democrat majority in Congress. **[If we don’t act now, soon it may be too late.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9bd6469a7ec546309a936b5cfc2b4f4c&_e=Mxq7H4eI9phGOSrRI6zOqyCMbBYbIFIh7tfEYgRRWGVViSWxoDV5ZvamNIOTzLVNUa7-bopeiZCnCdIAsVhyk9IouOdHd1B8I0JMPIAenPRsu1cIKZMtq4eRMtKJYs2pwEZoj7Q0vRnYRRCpMHKYOXBrUpGJFcm5PbGuWaAjmTTInp2hFVclO5d4XkWoIiWtFFwc5iyY_NWsJn6_PZp3_U1XLR7sozvDDHgCMnJ4v0LK835-cS4G6bFsavqWwAjto_2Wa4Bm6NKj3hmlkbAaVE_xLyNNS2EmP2DAmyHVuCwZM5X1w1KROb0Vq8yAIcFq8T-T79o1MK4XoUnNvF6NZ7lQMRlK2WWqAnaDDtLMW_d1iP6f2-pdcaMvIyfqn1-skL_Sb_qLh1QkYeIUxC05v5V-P1BSZssnI5_PCU6H5jG-qjq5B7EpwvpQ22ndWOOgSVk_NELrtuL9-8-nR3yQk9AmFQa22NCwbUe8agF3igfOL5uxW9Hlc-EHyEn4D2dI)**

Democrats are not going to adopt rules from states who have their act together – like Ohio and Florida – **they’re going to take their cue from Pennsylvania, New York, California and Illinois**.

Consider that for 97 days, New York’s 22nd Congressional District was without a member of Congress. Why? Due to severe delays in tabulating votes caused by confusion over hastily written voting laws put into place at the start of the pandemic.

Or consider that, while Florida was able to count more than 11 million votes in the run up to Election Day, **it took Pennsylvania more than two weeks to count their votes**.
[**Stand With Me
Protect Voter ID Laws➔**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9bd6469a7ec546309a936b5cfc2b4f4c&_e=Mxq7H4eI9phGOSrRI6zOqyCMbBYbIFIh7tfEYgRRWGVViSWxoDV5ZvamNIOTzLVNUa7-bopeiZCnCdIAsVhyk9IouOdHd1B8I0JMPIAenPRsu1cIKZMtq4eRMtKJYs2pwEZoj7Q0vRnYRRCpMHKYOXBrUpGJFcm5PbGuWaAjmTTInp2hFVclO5d4XkWoIiWtFFwc5iyY_NWsJn6_PZp3_U1XLR7sozvDDHgCMnJ4v0LK835-cS4G6bFsavqWwAjto_2Wa4Bm6NKj3hmlkbAaVE_xLyNNS2EmP2DAmyHVuCzjNFg2yDT7dLfmHhfKft3fBJxb6nwm7O86BEjnYrS-2IR6EqmXzevMqy7QAfDmXsGb_o6aMw3Xg5qU8YS81UFRqwx-3Vi9BQM8KiNck1cGm_dzyDfFPYRUG1Rs6Io85OGx8yB7wg1j7bduLfK1gTeP4pnPVQfEN9AFh7CnA9biNLULrFug0M8dLFQYZ_RS39Fod68z540rUWhBs4fZ87CP)
---

**On a final note:** With the adoption of H.R. 1, it will become exponentially harder for states to update voter rolls without federal oversight. That will lead to more and more voter fraud!

In the name of liberty, **[please sign our petition today denouncing H.R. 1.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9bd6469a7ec546309a936b5cfc2b4f4c&_e=Mxq7H4eI9phGOSrRI6zOqyCMbBYbIFIh7tfEYgRRWGVViSWxoDV5ZvamNIOTzLVNUa7-bopeiZCnCdIAsVhyk9IouOdHd1B8I0JMPIAenPRsu1cIKZMtq4eRMtKJYs2pwEZoj7Q0vRnYRRCpMHKYOXBrUpGJFcm5PbGuWaAjmTTInp2hFVclO5d4XkWoIiWtFFwc5iyY_NWsJn6_PZp3_U1XLR7sozvDDHgCMnJ4v0LK835-cS4G6bFsavqWwAjto_2Wa4Bm6NKj3hmlkbAaVE_xLyNNS2EmP2DAmyHVuCzdLSP2Lz1P-21WDh8pQvR_1YmBQGCxBR4pyn43boe3WXmgM-g4EifRVq8ln7W7PXMwIdw8nKfpmSp4EU2VZTclYmBB2JdtsiCpZx7X89hjadb2qF5v8DDgZajniDC4vrGe67oVeGI87YSf853fQ4kpxs6_6N46a0B6RDf3N2WMqxY4qPNM02Gw3s4FeGM4Zsl6ZpAIVzwrizN8ckmGsQDP)**

We must act before it’s too late.

clean_body: Pelosi wants to stack the deck against Republicans. With the latest bill she just jammed through, law-abiding Republicans won't stand a chance...Pelosi wants to stack the deck against Republicans by federalizing elections. | ELECTION INTEGRITY PLEDGE : Pelosi wants to stack the deck against Republicans by federalizing elections. We can put an end to these attempts at fundamentally altering the way our elections are run – but to do so we need to elect a Republican majority . | Friend, What a year for the socialist agenda in Congress. First, Nancy Pelosi passed the $1.9 trillion COVID relief package in the House – in the middle of the night – without a single Republican vote. Then, Pelosi and House Democrats pushed through another outrageous piece of legislation – H.R. 1, a massive election reform bill — which if passed by the Senate would enable Democrats to cement a permanent Congressional majority. How? By requiring states to adopt national voting standards set forth by Democrats in Congress including, 1. Allowing government agencies to ignore immigration status when referring applicants to election boards under “automatic” voter registration, and, 2. Doing away with state voter-ID laws. No ID to verify voter eligibility? No problem! While the entire bill is rubbish, there are several provisions that worry me more than others. Should Senate Democrats pass H.R. 1: 1. Members of Congress would be entitled to taxpayer money to fund their campaigns – up to $5 MILLION dollars. 2. Congress will be committed to delivering “full congressional voting rights to the District of Columbia (Washington, D.C.) – bypassing a vote on D.C. statehood which cannot pass in a bill of its own. We can put an end to these thinly-veiled attempts at fundamentally altering the way our elections are run – but to do so we need to elect a Republican majority. I have to be honest with you, Friend, while the COVID-relief package was chock full of wasteful spending that increased the budget deficit exponentially, H.R. 1 would fundamentally alter American elections forever. It’s our duty to raise awareness about Pelosi’s blatant attempt to amass a permanent Democrat majority in Congress. Democrats are not going to adopt rules from states who have their act together – like Ohio and Florida – they’re going to take their cue from Pennsylvania, New York, California and Illinois. Consider that for 97 days, New York’s 22nd Congressional District was without a member of Congress. Why? Due to severe delays in tabulating votes caused by confusion over hastily written voting laws put into place at the start of the pandemic. Or consider that, while Florida was able to count more than 11 million votes in the run up to Election Day, it took Pennsylvania more than two weeks to count their votes. On a final note: With the adoption of H.R. 1, it will become exponentially harder for states to update voter rolls without federal oversight. That will lead to more and more voter fraud! In the name of liberty, We must act before it’s too late. Jim Jordan | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends — we’re emailing for $5.
**Why? Because Mark reached out to you this morning about the six-figure ad buy Mitch McConnell dropped this week. We need your help to raise $45,237 more by midnight tomorrow to close the gap and stay on track to hit our $100,000 goal.**
In order to counter this avalanche of outside spending by Mitch McConnell, we are going to fight back one $5 donation at a time. Because that’s how we are going to hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate.
So as we approach our fundraising deadline tomorrow at midnight, we have to ask:
[**If you are able, will you make a $5 donation to our people-powered campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our $100,000 goal by tomorrow.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210515-2-15&t=1&refcode2=613_6688874_0vagcl&akid=613%2E6688874%2E0vagcl)
